title: How Should Voice Assistants Deal With Users' Emotions?
title_zh: 语音助手应该如何处理用户的情绪？
abstract: There is a growing body of research in HCI on detecting the users' emotions. Once it is possible to detect users' emotions reliably, the next question is how an emotion-aware interface should react to the detected emotion. In a first step, we tried to find out how humans deal with the negative emotions of an avatar. The hope behind this approach was to identify human strategies, which we can then mimic in an emotion-aware voice assistant. We present a user study in which participants were confronted with an angry, sad, or frightened avatar. Their task was to make the avatar happy by talking to it. We recorded the voice signal and analyzed it. The results show that users predominantly reacted with neutral emotion. However, we also found gender differences, which opens a range of questions.
summary: There is a growing body of research in HCI on detecting the users' emotions. Once it is possible to detect users' emotions reliably, the next question is how an emotion-aware interface should react to the detected emotion. In a first step, we tried to find out how humans deal with the negative emotions of an avatar. The hope behind this approach was to identify human strategies, which we can then mimic in an emotion-aware voice assistant. We present a user study in which participants were confronted with an angry, sad, or frightened avatar. Their task was to make the avatar happy by talking to it. We recorded the voice signal and analyzed it. The results show that users predominantly reacted with neutral emotion. However, we also found gender differences, which opens a range of questions.
abstract_zh: 人机交互领域关于检测用户情绪的研究越来越多。一旦能够可靠地检测用户的情绪，下一个问题是情绪感知界面应如何对检测到的情绪做出反应。第一步，我们试图找出人类如何处理化身的负面情绪。这种方法背后的希望是识别人类策略，然后我们可以在情感感知语音助手中模仿这些策略。我们提出了一项用户研究，其中参与者面对的是愤怒、悲伤或害怕的化身。他们的任务是通过与化身交谈来使其高兴。我们记录了语音信号并对其进行了分析。结果显示，用户主要以中性情绪做出反应。然而，我们也发现了性别差异，这引发了一系列问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨语音助手如何应对用户情绪，通过研究人类处理虚拟角色负面情绪的策略，为设计情绪感知接口提供参考。
AI.motivation: 尽管情绪检测技术逐渐成熟，但如何有效应对检测到的情绪仍是未知领域，需借鉴人类交互策略以优化语音助手反应机制。
AI.method: 通过用户实验，让参与者与呈现愤怒/悲伤/恐惧情绪的虚拟角色对话，记录并分析其语音反应数据。
AI.result: 用户主要以中性情绪回应虚拟角色，但发现显著的性别差异，引发进一步研究需求。
AI.conclusion: 需深入研究性别差异等变量，以指导语音助手开发更符合人类交互习惯的情绪应对策略。

title: Model Based Meta Learning of Critics for Policy Gradients
title_zh: 基于模型的政策梯度批评者元学习
abstract: Being able to seamlessly generalize across different tasks is fundamental for robots to act in our world. However, learning representations that generalize quickly to new scenarios is still an open research problem in reinforcement learning. In this paper we present a framework to meta-learn the critic for gradient-based policy learning. Concretely, we propose a model-based bi-level optimization algorithm that updates the critics parameters such that the policy that is learned with the updated critic gets closer to solving the meta-training tasks. We illustrate that our algorithm leads to learned critics that resemble the ground truth Q function for a given task. Finally, after meta-training, the learned critic can be used to learn new policies for new unseen task and environment settings via model-free policy gradient optimization, without requiring a model. We present results that show the generalization capabilities of our learned critic to new tasks and dynamics when used to learn a new policy in a new scenario.
summary: Being able to seamlessly generalize across different tasks is fundamental for robots to act in our world. However, learning representations that generalize quickly to new scenarios is still an open research problem in reinforcement learning. In this paper we present a framework to meta-learn the critic for gradient-based policy learning. Concretely, we propose a model-based bi-level optimization algorithm that updates the critics parameters such that the policy that is learned with the updated critic gets closer to solving the meta-training tasks. We illustrate that our algorithm leads to learned critics that resemble the ground truth Q function for a given task. Finally, after meta-training, the learned critic can be used to learn new policies for new unseen task and environment settings via model-free policy gradient optimization, without requiring a model. We present results that show the generalization capabilities of our learned critic to new tasks and dynamics when used to learn a new policy in a new scenario.
abstract_zh: 能够无缝地概括不同的任务是机器人在我们的世界中行动的基础。然而，快速泛化到新场景的学习表示仍然是强化学习中的一个开放研究问题。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架来对基于梯度的策略学习的批评家进行元学习。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于模型的双层优化算法，该算法更新批评者参数，以便使用更新的批评者学习的策略更接近于解决元训练任务。我们说明，我们的算法会产生类似于给定任务的真实 Q 函数的学习批评家。最后，在元训练之后，学习批评家可以通过无模型策略梯度优化来学习新的未见任务和环境设置的新策略，而无需模型。我们提出的结果显示了我们的学习批评家在用于学习新场景中的新策略时对新任务和动态的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的元学习框架，通过优化策略梯度中的评论家（critic）来提升强化学习在跨任务场景中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在跨任务泛化能力上存在不足，难以快速适应新场景，需探索更高效的表示学习方法以实现通用性。
AI.method: 设计基于模型的双层优化算法，通过元训练更新评论家参数，使其更贴近任务的真实Q函数，并在新任务中使用无模型策略梯度方法学习新策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，学习到的评论家能有效泛化至新任务和动态环境，且无需依赖环境模型即可完成策略优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过元学习提升评论家的跨任务适应性，为机器人在未知环境中的快速学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: Abstractive summarization of hospitalisation histories with transformer networks
title_zh: 使用变压器网络对住院历史进行抽象总结
abstract: In this paper we present a novel approach to abstractive summarization of patient hospitalisation histories. We applied an encoder-decoder framework with Longformer neural network as an encoder and BERT as a decoder. Our experiments show improved quality on some summarization tasks compared with pointer-generator networks. We also conducted a study with experienced physicians evaluating the results of our model in comparison with PGN baseline and human-generated abstracts, which showed the effectiveness of our model.
summary: In this paper we present a novel approach to abstractive summarization of patient hospitalisation histories. We applied an encoder-decoder framework with Longformer neural network as an encoder and BERT as a decoder. Our experiments show improved quality on some summarization tasks compared with pointer-generator networks. We also conducted a study with experienced physicians evaluating the results of our model in comparison with PGN baseline and human-generated abstracts, which showed the effectiveness of our model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种对患者住院史进行抽象总结的新方法。我们应用了编码器-解码器框架，其中 Longformer 神经网络作为编码器，BERT 作为解码器。我们的实验表明，与指针生成器网络相比，某些摘要任务的质量有所提高。我们还与经验丰富的医生进行了一项研究，将我们的模型的结果与 PGN 基线和人类生成的摘要进行比较，这表明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Transformer网络的患者住院史抽象式摘要方法
AI.motivation: 改进医疗文本摘要质量，解决传统指针生成网络在临床场景中的局限性
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器框架，使用Longformer作为编码器，BERT作为解码器进行模型构建
AI.result: 实验表明模型在摘要任务上优于PGN，且医生评估验证了其有效性
AI.conclusion: 证明了Transformer框架在医疗文本摘要中的有效性，为临床应用提供参考

title: Automating Staged Rollout with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习自动分阶段推出
abstract: Staged rollout is a strategy of incrementally releasing software updates to portions of the user population in order to accelerate defect discovery without incurring catastrophic outcomes such as system wide outages. Some past studies have examined how to quantify and automate staged rollout, but stop short of simultaneously considering multiple product or process metrics explicitly. This paper demonstrates the potential to automate staged rollout with multi-objective reinforcement learning in order to dynamically balance stakeholder needs such as time to deliver new features and downtime incurred by failures due to latent defects.
summary: Staged rollout is a strategy of incrementally releasing software updates to portions of the user population in order to accelerate defect discovery without incurring catastrophic outcomes such as system wide outages. Some past studies have examined how to quantify and automate staged rollout, but stop short of simultaneously considering multiple product or process metrics explicitly. This paper demonstrates the potential to automate staged rollout with multi-objective reinforcement learning in order to dynamically balance stakeholder needs such as time to deliver new features and downtime incurred by failures due to latent defects.
abstract_zh: 分阶段推出是一种向部分用户群逐步发布软件更新的策略，以加速缺陷发现，而不会导致系统范围内的停机等灾难性后果。过去的一些研究已经研究了如何量化和自动化分阶段推出，但没有同时明确考虑多个产品或流程指标。本文展示了通过多目标强化学习自动分阶段推出的潜力，以便动态平衡利益相关者的需求，例如交付新功能的时间和因潜在缺陷导致的故障而导致的停机时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用多目标强化学习自动化分阶段发布软件更新，以动态平衡交付新功能的时间与故障导致的停机时间等多方需求。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽探索了分阶段发布的量化与自动化方法，但未能同时显式考虑多个产品或流程指标，难以满足多方利益相关者的复杂需求。
AI.method: 采用多目标强化学习框架，通过动态权衡时间交付与系统稳定性等指标，实现分阶段发布的自动化决策。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效平衡新功能交付速度与故障停机时间，优于传统静态策略和单一目标优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 多目标强化学习为分阶段发布提供了新的自动化解决方案，未来可进一步结合实际系统指标优化算法鲁棒性。

search_text: Automating Staged Rollout with Reinforcement Learning 通过强化学习自动分阶段推出 Staged rollout is a strategy of incrementally releasing software updates to portions of the user population in order to accelerate defect discovery without incurring catastrophic outcomes such as system wide outages. Some past studies have examined how to quantify and automate staged rollout, but stop short of simultaneously considering multiple product or process metrics explicitly. This paper demonstrates the potential to automate staged rollout with multi-objective reinforcement learning in order to dynamically balance stakeholder needs such as time to deliver new features and downtime incurred by failures due to latent defects. 分阶段推出是一种向部分用户群逐步发布软件更新的策略，以加速缺陷发现，而不会导致系统范围内的停机等灾难性后果。过去的一些研究已经研究了如何量化和自动化分阶段推出，但没有同时明确考虑多个产品或流程指标。本文展示了通过多目标强化学习自动分阶段推出的潜力，以便动态平衡利益相关者的需求，例如交付新功能的时间和因潜在缺陷导致的故障而导致的停机时间。 本文提出利用多目标强化学习自动化分阶段发布软件更新，以动态平衡交付新功能的时间与故障导致的停机时间等多方需求。 Shadow Pritchard,Vidhyashree Nagaraju,Lance Fiondella cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: José Ángel Morell,Zakaria Abdelmoiz Dahi,Francisco Chicano,Gabriel Luque,Enrique Alba
title: Optimising Communication Overhead in Federated Learning Using NSGA-II
title_zh: 使用 NSGA-II 优化联邦学习中的通信开销
abstract: Federated learning is a training paradigm according to which a server-based model is cooperatively trained using local models running on edge devices and ensuring data privacy. These devices exchange information that induces a substantial communication load, which jeopardises the functioning efficiency. The difficulty of reducing this overhead stands in achieving this without decreasing the model's efficiency (contradictory relation). To do so, many works investigated the compression of the pre/mid/post-trained models and the communication rounds, separately, although they jointly contribute to the communication overload. Our work aims at optimising communication overhead in federated learning by (I) modelling it as a multi-objective problem and (II) applying a multi-objective optimization algorithm (NSGA-II) to solve it. To the best of the author's knowledge, this is the first work that \texttt{(I)} explores the add-in that evolutionary computation could bring for solving such a problem, and \texttt{(II)} considers both the neuron and devices features together. We perform the experimentation by simulating a server/client architecture with 4 slaves. We investigate both convolutional and fully-connected neural networks with 12 and 3 layers, 887,530 and 33,400 weights, respectively. We conducted the validation on the \texttt{MNIST} dataset containing 70,000 images. The experiments have shown that our proposal could reduce communication by 99% and maintain an accuracy equal to the one obtained by the FedAvg Algorithm that uses 100% of communications.
summary: Federated learning is a training paradigm according to which a server-based model is cooperatively trained using local models running on edge devices and ensuring data privacy. These devices exchange information that induces a substantial communication load, which jeopardises the functioning efficiency. The difficulty of reducing this overhead stands in achieving this without decreasing the model's efficiency (contradictory relation). To do so, many works investigated the compression of the pre/mid/post-trained models and the communication rounds, separately, although they jointly contribute to the communication overload. Our work aims at optimising communication overhead in federated learning by (I) modelling it as a multi-objective problem and (II) applying a multi-objective optimization algorithm (NSGA-II) to solve it. To the best of the author's knowledge, this is the first work that \texttt{(I)} explores the add-in that evolutionary computation could bring for solving such a problem, and \texttt{(II)} considers both the neuron and devices features together. We perform the experimentation by simulating a server/client architecture with 4 slaves. We investigate both convolutional and fully-connected neural networks with 12 and 3 layers, 887,530 and 33,400 weights, respectively. We conducted the validation on the \texttt{MNIST} dataset containing 70,000 images. The experiments have shown that our proposal could reduce communication by 99% and maintain an accuracy equal to the one obtained by the FedAvg Algorithm that uses 100% of communications.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种训练范例，根据该范例，使用在边缘设备上运行的本地模型来协作训练基于服务器的模型并确保数据隐私。这些设备交换信息会产生大量的通信负载，从而危及运行效率。减少这种开销的困难在于在不降低模型效率的情况下实现这一点（矛盾关系）。为此，许多工作分别研究了训练前/中期/训练后模型的压缩和通信轮次，尽管它们共同导致了通信过载。我们的工作旨在通过（I）将其建模为多目标问题并（II）应用多目标优化算法（NSGA-II）来解决它来优化联邦学习中的通信开销。据作者所知，这是 \texttt{(I)} 探索进化计算可以为解决此类问题带来的插件的第一个作品，并且 \texttt{(II)} 同时考虑神经元和设备特征。我们通过模拟具有 4 个从站的服务器/客户端架构来进行实验。我们研究了 12 层和 3 层的卷积神经网络和全连接神经网络，权重分别为 887,530 和 33,400。我们对包含 70,000 张图像的 \texttt{MNIST} 数据集进行了验证。实验表明，我们的建议可以减少 99% 的通信量，并且保持与使用 100% 通信的 FedAvg 算法获得的精度相同的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用NSGA-II算法优化联邦学习中的通信开销，通过多目标建模实现通信效率与模型性能的平衡。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中设备间通信开销大，传统方法单独优化模型压缩或通信轮次无法兼顾效率与性能，需探索协同优化方案。
AI.method: 将通信开销优化建模为多目标问题，采用NSGA-II算法联合优化神经网络结构与设备通信策略，并基于MNIST数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在通信量减少99%的情况下，保持与全通信FedAvg算法相同的模型准确率。
AI.conclusion: NSGA-II算法有效解决了联邦学习通信开销与模型性能的矛盾，为多目标优化提供了新的应用方向。

authors_text: Hyeonbin Hwang,Soyeon Kim,Wei-Jin Park,Jiho Seo,Kyungtae Ko,Hyeon Yeo
title: Vision Transformer Equipped with Neural Resizer on Facial Expression Recognition Task
title_zh: 配备 Neural Resizer 的 Vision Transformer 用于面部表情识别任务
abstract: When it comes to wild conditions, Facial Expression Recognition is often challenged with low-quality data and imbalanced, ambiguous labels. This field has much benefited from CNN based approaches; however, CNN models have structural limitation to see the facial regions in distant. As a remedy, Transformer has been introduced to vision fields with global receptive field, but requires adjusting input spatial size to the pretrained models to enjoy their strong inductive bias at hands. We herein raise a question whether using the deterministic interpolation method is enough to feed low-resolution data to Transformer. In this work, we propose a novel training framework, Neural Resizer, to support Transformer by compensating information and downscaling in a data-driven manner trained with loss function balancing the noisiness and imbalance. Experiments show our Neural Resizer with F-PDLS loss function improves the performance with Transformer variants in general and nearly achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: When it comes to wild conditions, Facial Expression Recognition is often challenged with low-quality data and imbalanced, ambiguous labels. This field has much benefited from CNN based approaches; however, CNN models have structural limitation to see the facial regions in distant. As a remedy, Transformer has been introduced to vision fields with global receptive field, but requires adjusting input spatial size to the pretrained models to enjoy their strong inductive bias at hands. We herein raise a question whether using the deterministic interpolation method is enough to feed low-resolution data to Transformer. In this work, we propose a novel training framework, Neural Resizer, to support Transformer by compensating information and downscaling in a data-driven manner trained with loss function balancing the noisiness and imbalance. Experiments show our Neural Resizer with F-PDLS loss function improves the performance with Transformer variants in general and nearly achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 在野外条件下，面部表情识别经常面临低质量数据和不平衡、模糊标签的挑战。该领域从基于 CNN 的方法中受益匪浅；然而，CNN 模型在观察远处的面部区域时存在结构限制。作为补救措施，Transformer 已被引入具有全局感受野的视野，但需要调整输入空间大小以适应预训练模型，以享受其强大的归纳偏差。我们在此提出一个问题，使用确定性插值方法是否足以将低分辨率数据提供给 Transformer。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架 Neural Resizer，通过以数据驱动的方式补偿信息和缩小规模来支持 Transformer，并使用平衡噪声和不平衡的损失函数进行训练。实验表明，我们具有 F-PDLS 损失函数的 Neural Resizer 总体上提高了 Transformer 变体的性能，几乎达到了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Neural Resizer的新框架，结合F-PDLS损失函数，以改进Transformer在面部表情识别任务中处理低分辨率和不平衡数据的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在面部表情识别中存在结构局限，而Transformer虽具全局感受野优势，但需调整输入尺寸以适配预训练模型，且确定性插值方法难以有效处理低质量数据和不平衡标签。
AI.method: 设计Neural Resizer框架，通过数据驱动方式补偿信息并进行下采样，结合F-PDLS损失函数平衡噪声与标签不平衡问题，以优化Transformer的输入调整过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，Neural Resizer与Transformer变体结合后，显著提升模型性能，接近当前最优水平（state-of-the-art）。
AI.conclusion: Neural Resizer有效解决了Transformer在面部表情识别任务中输入调整的挑战，验证了其在处理低质量数据和不平衡标签场景下的优越性。

motivation: 传统CNN在面部表情识别中存在结构局限，而Transformer虽具全局感受野优势，但需调整输入尺寸以适配预训练模型，且确定性插值方法难以有效处理低质量数据和不平衡标签。
method: 设计Neural Resizer框架，通过数据驱动方式补偿信息并进行下采样，结合F-PDLS损失函数平衡噪声与标签不平衡问题，以优化Transformer的输入调整过程。
result: 实验表明，Neural Resizer与Transformer变体结合后，显著提升模型性能，接近当前最优水平（state-of-the-art）。
conclusion: Neural Resizer有效解决了Transformer在面部表情识别任务中输入调整的挑战，验证了其在处理低质量数据和不平衡标签场景下的优越性。
search_text: Vision Transformer Equipped with Neural Resizer on Facial Expression Recognition Task 配备 Neural Resizer 的 Vision Transformer 用于面部表情识别任务 When it comes to wild conditions, Facial Expression Recognition is often challenged with low-quality data and imbalanced, ambiguous labels. This field has much benefited from CNN based approaches; however, CNN models have structural limitation to see the facial regions in distant. As a remedy, Transformer has been introduced to vision fields with global receptive field, but requires adjusting input spatial size to the pretrained models to enjoy their strong inductive bias at hands. We herein raise a question whether using the deterministic interpolation method is enough to feed low-resolution data to Transformer. In this work, we propose a novel training framework, Neural Resizer, to support Transformer by compensating information and downscaling in a data-driven manner trained with loss function balancing the noisiness and imbalance. Experiments show our Neural Resizer with F-PDLS loss function improves the performance with Transformer variants in general and nearly achieves the state-of-the-art performance. 在野外条件下，面部表情识别经常面临低质量数据和不平衡、模糊标签的挑战。该领域从基于 CNN 的方法中受益匪浅；然而，CNN 模型在观察远处的面部区域时存在结构限制。作为补救措施，Transformer 已被引入具有全局感受野的视野，但需要调整输入空间大小以适应预训练模型，以享受其强大的归纳偏差。我们在此提出一个问题，使用确定性插值方法是否足以将低分辨率数据提供给 Transformer。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架 Neural Resizer，通过以数据驱动的方式补偿信息和缩小规模来支持 Transformer，并使用平衡噪声和不平衡的损失函数进行训练。实验表明，我们具有 F-PDLS 损失函数的 Neural Resizer 总体上提高了 Transformer 变体的性能，几乎达到了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种名为Neural Resizer的新框架，结合F-PDLS损失函数，以改进Transformer在面部表情识别任务中处理低分辨率和不平衡数据的能力。 Hyeonbin Hwang,Soyeon Kim,Wei-Jin Park,Jiho Seo,Kyungtae Ko,Hyeon Yeo cs.CV

authors_text: Ahmed Aqeel Shaikh,Anand Kumar Mukhopadhyay,Soumyajit Poddar,Suman Samui
title: Towards Robust and Accurate Myoelectric Controller Design based on Multi-objective Optimization using Evolutionary Computation
title_zh: 基于进化计算多目标优化的稳健而准确的肌电控制器设计
abstract: Myoelectric pattern recognition is one of the important aspects in the design of the control strategy for various applications including upper-limb prostheses and bio-robotic hand movement systems. The current work has proposed an approach to design an energy-efficient EMG-based controller by considering a kernelized SVM classifier for decoding the information of surface electromyography (sEMG) signals to infer the underlying muscle movements. In order to achieve the optimized performance of the EMG-based controller, our main strategy of classifier design is to reduce the false movements of the overall system (when the EMG-based controller is at the `Rest' position). To this end, we have formulated the training algorithm of the proposed supervised learning system as a general constrained multi-objective optimization problem. An elitist multi-objective evolutionary algorithm $-$ the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) has been used to tune the hyperparameters of SVM. We have presented the experimental results by performing the experiments on a dataset consisting of the sEMG signals collected from eleven subjects at five different upper limb positions. Furthermore, the performance of the trained models based on the two-objective metrics, namely classification accuracy, and false-negative have been evaluated on two different test sets to examine the generalization capability of the proposed training approach while implementing limb-position invariant EMG classification. It is evident from the presented result that the proposed approach provides much more flexibility to the designer in selecting the parameters of the classifier to optimize the energy efficiency of the EMG-based controller.
summary: Myoelectric pattern recognition is one of the important aspects in the design of the control strategy for various applications including upper-limb prostheses and bio-robotic hand movement systems. The current work has proposed an approach to design an energy-efficient EMG-based controller by considering a kernelized SVM classifier for decoding the information of surface electromyography (sEMG) signals to infer the underlying muscle movements. In order to achieve the optimized performance of the EMG-based controller, our main strategy of classifier design is to reduce the false movements of the overall system (when the EMG-based controller is at the `Rest' position). To this end, we have formulated the training algorithm of the proposed supervised learning system as a general constrained multi-objective optimization problem. An elitist multi-objective evolutionary algorithm $-$ the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) has been used to tune the hyperparameters of SVM. We have presented the experimental results by performing the experiments on a dataset consisting of the sEMG signals collected from eleven subjects at five different upper limb positions. Furthermore, the performance of the trained models based on the two-objective metrics, namely classification accuracy, and false-negative have been evaluated on two different test sets to examine the generalization capability of the proposed training approach while implementing limb-position invariant EMG classification. It is evident from the presented result that the proposed approach provides much more flexibility to the designer in selecting the parameters of the classifier to optimize the energy efficiency of the EMG-based controller.
abstract_zh: 肌电模式识别是上肢假肢和生物机器人手部运动系统等各种应用控制策略设计的重要方面之一。目前的工作提出了一种设计基于 EMG 的节能控制器的方法，通过考虑内核化 SVM 分类器来解码表面肌电 (sEMG) 信号信息以推断潜在的肌肉运动。为了实现基于 EMG 的控制器的优化性能，我们分类器设计的主要策略是减少整个系统的错误运动（当基于 EMG 的控制器处于“休息”位置时）。为此，我们将所提出的监督学习系统的训练算法制定为一般约束多目标优化问题。精英多目标进化算法$-$非支配排序遗传算法II (NSGA-II)已被用来调整SVM的超参数。我们通过对数据集进行实验来呈现实验结果，该数据集由从 11 名受试者在 5 个不同上肢位置收集的 sEMG 信号组成。此外，基于双目标指标（即分类准确性和假阴性）的训练模型的性能在两个不同的测试集上进行了评估，以检查所提出的训练方法在实现肢体位置不变肌电图分类时的泛化能力。从所呈现的结果可以明显看出，所提出的方法为设计者选择分类器参数以优化基于 EMG 的控制器的能量效率提供了更大的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多目标优化的进化计算方法，用于设计鲁棒且精确的肌电假肢控制器。
AI.motivation: 现有肌电控制器在'休息'状态下存在误动作问题，需通过优化分类器参数提升能效并减少误判。
AI.method: 采用核化SVM分类器解码sEMG信号，并通过NSGA-II多目标进化算法优化SVM超参数，以平衡分类准确率与误判率。
AI.result: 在11名受试者5种肢体位置数据集上验证，模型在两类测试集上均表现出良好的泛化能力，证明方法能有效提升控制器能效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多目标优化框架为分类器参数选择提供灵活性，显著提升了肌电控制器的鲁棒性与能量效率。

title: Multi-View Transformer for 3D Visual Grounding
title_zh: 用于 3D 视觉基础的多视图变压器
abstract: The 3D visual grounding task aims to ground a natural language description to the targeted object in a 3D scene, which is usually represented in 3D point clouds. Previous works studied visual grounding under specific views. The vision-language correspondence learned by this way can easily fail once the view changes. In this paper, we propose a Multi-View Transformer (MVT) for 3D visual grounding. We project the 3D scene to a multi-view space, in which the position information of the 3D scene under different views are modeled simultaneously and aggregated together. The multi-view space enables the network to learn a more robust multi-modal representation for 3D visual grounding and eliminates the dependence on specific views. Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, on Nr3D and Sr3D datasets, our method outperforms the best competitor by 11.2% and 7.1% and even surpasses recent work with extra 2D assistance by 5.9% and 6.6%. Our code is available at https://github.com/sega-hsj/MVT-3DVG.
summary: The 3D visual grounding task aims to ground a natural language description to the targeted object in a 3D scene, which is usually represented in 3D point clouds. Previous works studied visual grounding under specific views. The vision-language correspondence learned by this way can easily fail once the view changes. In this paper, we propose a Multi-View Transformer (MVT) for 3D visual grounding. We project the 3D scene to a multi-view space, in which the position information of the 3D scene under different views are modeled simultaneously and aggregated together. The multi-view space enables the network to learn a more robust multi-modal representation for 3D visual grounding and eliminates the dependence on specific views. Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, on Nr3D and Sr3D datasets, our method outperforms the best competitor by 11.2% and 7.1% and even surpasses recent work with extra 2D assistance by 5.9% and 6.6%. Our code is available at https://github.com/sega-hsj/MVT-3DVG.
abstract_zh: 3D 视觉基础任务旨在将自然语言描述基础到 3D 场景中的目标对象，该场景通常以 3D 点云表示。之前的作品研究了特定视图下的视觉基础。一旦视图发生变化，通过这种方式学习到的视觉-语言对应关系很容易失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 视觉基础的多视图变换器 (MVT)。我们将 3D 场景投影到多视图空间，其中不同视图下 3D 场景的位置信息同时建模并聚合在一起。多视图空间使网络能够学习更强大的多模态表示以实现 3D 视觉基础，并消除对特定视图的依赖。大量的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于所有最先进的方法。具体来说，在 Nr3D 和 Sr3D 数据集上，我们的方法比最好的竞争对手高出 11.2% 和 7.1%，甚至比最近在额外 2D 辅助下的工作高出 5.9% 和 6.6%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sega-hsj/MVT-3DVG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多视角Transformer（MVT）方法，用于解决3D视觉定位任务，即将自然语言描述与3D场景中的目标物体进行匹配。
AI.motivation: 以往的视觉定位方法依赖于特定视角，导致在视角变化时性能下降。因此，本文旨在提出一种与视角无关的方法，以提升3D视觉定位的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 该方法将3D场景投影到多视角空间，同时建模和聚合不同视角下的位置信息，从而学习到更鲁棒的多模态表示。
AI.result: 在Nr3D和Sr3D数据集上，该方法分别优于最佳竞争方法11.2%和7.1%，并且在无需额外2D信息的情况下，也优于最近的相关工作5.9%和6.6%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多视角Transformer方法显著提升了3D视觉定位任务的性能，且不依赖于特定视角，具有较好的通用性和鲁棒性。

Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art methods. Specifically, on Nr3D and Sr3D datasets, our method outperforms the best competitor by 11.2% and 7.1% and even surpasses recent work with extra 2D assistance by 5.9% and 6.6%. Our code is available at https://github.com/sega-hsj/MVT-3DVG. 3D 视觉基础任务旨在将自然语言描述基础到 3D 场景中的目标对象，该场景通常以 3D 点云表示。之前的作品研究了特定视图下的视觉基础。一旦视图发生变化，通过这种方式学习到的视觉-语言对应关系很容易失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 视觉基础的多视图变换器 (MVT)。我们将 3D 场景投影到多视图空间，其中不同视图下 3D 场景的位置信息同时建模并聚合在一起。多视图空间使网络能够学习更强大的多模态表示以实现 3D 视觉基础，并消除对特定视图的依赖。大量的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于所有最先进的方法。具体来说，在 Nr3D 和 Sr3D 数据集上，我们的方法比最好的竞争对手高出 11.2% 和 7.1%，甚至比最近在额外 2D 辅助下的工作高出 5.9% 和 6.6%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sega-hsj/MVT-3DVG 获取。 本文提出了一种多视角Transformer（MVT）方法，用于解决3D视觉定位任务，即将自然语言描述与3D场景中的目标物体进行匹配。 Shijia Huang,Yilun Chen,Jiaya Jia,Liwei Wang cs.CV,cs.CL

title: Multilinguals at SemEval-2022 Task 11: Transformer Based Architecture for Complex NER
title_zh: SemEval-2022 任务 11 中的多语言：复杂 NER 的基于 Transformer 的架构
abstract: We investigate the task of complex NER for the English language. The task is non-trivial due to the semantic ambiguity of the textual structure and the rarity of occurrence of such entities in the prevalent literature. Using pre-trained language models such as BERT, we obtain a competitive performance on this task. We qualitatively analyze the performance of multiple architectures for this task. All our models are able to outperform the baseline by a significant margin. Our best performing model beats the baseline F1-score by over 9%.
summary: We investigate the task of complex NER for the English language. The task is non-trivial due to the semantic ambiguity of the textual structure and the rarity of occurrence of such entities in the prevalent literature. Using pre-trained language models such as BERT, we obtain a competitive performance on this task. We qualitatively analyze the performance of multiple architectures for this task. All our models are able to outperform the baseline by a significant margin. Our best performing model beats the baseline F1-score by over 9%.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了英语语言的复杂 NER 任务。由于文本结构的语义模糊性以及此类实体在流行文献中很少出现，因此这项任务并不简单。使用 BERT 等预先训练的语言模型，我们在这项任务上获得了有竞争力的表现。我们定性分析了此任务的多种架构的性能。我们所有的模型都能够显着优于基线。我们性能最佳的模型比基线 F1 分数高出 9% 以上。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了英语复杂命名实体识别（NER）任务，提出基于Transformer的架构以解决语义模糊和实体稀有性问题。
AI.motivation: 复杂NER任务因文本结构语义歧义及实体在文献中出现频率低而具有挑战性，需探索更有效的模型解决这些问题。
AI.method: 采用预训练语言模型（如BERT）并设计多种架构进行实验，通过定性分析比较不同模型性能。
AI.result: 所有模型均显著超越基线，最佳模型F1分数提升超9%。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构在复杂NER任务中表现优异，未来可扩展至多语言场景。

title: Adversarial Learning of Intermediate Acoustic Feature for End-to-End Lightweight Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 端到端轻量级文本转语音的中间声学特征的对抗性学习
abstract: To simplify the generation process, several text-to-speech (TTS) systems implicitly learn intermediate latent representations instead of relying on predefined features (e.g., mel-spectrogram). However, their generation quality is unsatisfactory as these representations lack speech variances. In this paper, we improve TTS performance by adding \emph{prosody embeddings} to the latent representations. During training, we extract reference prosody embeddings from mel-spectrograms, and during inference, we estimate these embeddings from text using generative adversarial networks (GANs). Using GANs, we reliably estimate the prosody embeddings in a fast way, which have complex distributions due to the dynamic nature of speech. We also show that the prosody embeddings work as efficient features for learning a robust alignment between text and acoustic features. Our proposed model surpasses several publicly available models with less parameters and computational complexity in comparative experiments.
summary: To simplify the generation process, several text-to-speech (TTS) systems implicitly learn intermediate latent representations instead of relying on predefined features (e.g., mel-spectrogram). However, their generation quality is unsatisfactory as these representations lack speech variances. In this paper, we improve TTS performance by adding \emph{prosody embeddings} to the latent representations. During training, we extract reference prosody embeddings from mel-spectrograms, and during inference, we estimate these embeddings from text using generative adversarial networks (GANs). Using GANs, we reliably estimate the prosody embeddings in a fast way, which have complex distributions due to the dynamic nature of speech. We also show that the prosody embeddings work as efficient features for learning a robust alignment between text and acoustic features. Our proposed model surpasses several publicly available models with less parameters and computational complexity in comparative experiments.
abstract_zh: 为了简化生成过程，一些文本转语音 (TTS) 系统隐式学习中间潜在表示，而不是依赖预定义的特征（例如梅尔频谱图）。然而，它们的生成质量并不令人满意，因为这些表示缺乏语音差异。在本文中，我们通过向潜在表示添加 \emph{prosody embeddings} 来提高 TTS 性能。在训练过程中，我们从梅尔谱图中提取参考韵律嵌入，在推理过程中，我们使用生成对抗网络（GAN）从文本中估计这些嵌入。使用 GAN，我们可以快速可靠地估计韵律嵌入，由于语音的动态特性，韵律嵌入具有复杂的分布。我们还表明，韵律嵌入是学习文本和声学特征之间稳健对齐的有效特征。在比较实验中，我们提出的模型以更少的参数和计算复杂度超越了几个公开可用的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对抗学习中间声学特征来改进端到端轻量级文本到语音合成系统。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音系统因中间潜在表示缺乏语音变化而导致生成质量不足，需提升表现力与效率。
AI.method: 在潜在表示中引入韵律嵌入，训练时从梅尔频谱图提取参考嵌入，推理时使用生成对抗网络（GAN）快速估计文本的韵律嵌入。
AI.result: 所提模型在参数量和计算复杂度更低的情况下，优于多个公开模型，验证了韵律嵌入的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗学习韵律嵌入能高效生成高质量语音，为轻量级TTS系统提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Alexander Tschantz,Beren Millidge,Anil K Seth,Christopher L Buckley
title: Hybrid Predictive Coding: Inferring, Fast and Slow
title_zh: 混合预测编码：推断、快速和慢速
abstract: Predictive coding is an influential model of cortical neural activity. It proposes that perceptual beliefs are furnished by sequentially minimising "prediction errors" - the differences between predicted and observed data. Implicit in this proposal is the idea that perception requires multiple cycles of neural activity. This is at odds with evidence that several aspects of visual perception - including complex forms of object recognition - arise from an initial "feedforward sweep" that occurs on fast timescales which preclude substantial recurrent activity. Here, we propose that the feedforward sweep can be understood as performing amortized inference and recurrent processing can be understood as performing iterative inference. We propose a hybrid predictive coding network that combines both iterative and amortized inference in a principled manner by describing both in terms of a dual optimization of a single objective function. We show that the resulting scheme can be implemented in a biologically plausible neural architecture that approximates Bayesian inference utilising local Hebbian update rules. We demonstrate that our hybrid predictive coding model combines the benefits of both amortized and iterative inference -- obtaining rapid and computationally cheap perceptual inference for familiar data while maintaining the context-sensitivity, precision, and sample efficiency of iterative inference schemes. Moreover, we show how our model is inherently sensitive to its uncertainty and adaptively balances iterative and amortized inference to obtain accurate beliefs using minimum computational expense. Hybrid predictive coding offers a new perspective on the functional relevance of the feedforward and recurrent activity observed during visual perception and offers novel insights into distinct aspects of visual phenomenology.
summary: Predictive coding is an influential model of cortical neural activity. It proposes that perceptual beliefs are furnished by sequentially minimising "prediction errors" - the differences between predicted and observed data. Implicit in this proposal is the idea that perception requires multiple cycles of neural activity. This is at odds with evidence that several aspects of visual perception - including complex forms of object recognition - arise from an initial "feedforward sweep" that occurs on fast timescales which preclude substantial recurrent activity. Here, we propose that the feedforward sweep can be understood as performing amortized inference and recurrent processing can be understood as performing iterative inference. We propose a hybrid predictive coding network that combines both iterative and amortized inference in a principled manner by describing both in terms of a dual optimization of a single objective function. We show that the resulting scheme can be implemented in a biologically plausible neural architecture that approximates Bayesian inference utilising local Hebbian update rules. We demonstrate that our hybrid predictive coding model combines the benefits of both amortized and iterative inference -- obtaining rapid and computationally cheap perceptual inference for familiar data while maintaining the context-sensitivity, precision, and sample efficiency of iterative inference schemes. Moreover, we show how our model is inherently sensitive to its uncertainty and adaptively balances iterative and amortized inference to obtain accurate beliefs using minimum computational expense. Hybrid predictive coding offers a new perspective on the functional relevance of the feedforward and recurrent activity observed during visual perception and offers novel insights into distinct aspects of visual phenomenology.
abstract_zh: 预测编码是皮质神经活动的一个有影响力的模型。它提出，感知信念是通过依次最小化“预测误差”（预测数据与观察数据之间的差异）来提供的。该提议隐含的观点是感知需要多个神经活动周期。这与视觉感知的几个方面（包括复杂形式的物体识别）产生于快速时间尺度上发生的初始“前馈扫描”的证据相矛盾，这排除了大量的重复活动。在这里，我们建议前馈扫描可以理解为执行摊销推理，而循环处理可以理解为执行迭代推理。我们提出了一种混合预测编码网络，通过用单个目标函数的双重优化来描述迭代推理和摊销推理，以原则性的方式将两者结合起来。我们表明，所得到的方案可以在生物学上合理的神经架构中实现，该架构利用局部赫布更新规则来近似贝叶斯推理。我们证明了我们的混合预测编码模型结合了摊销推理和迭代推理的优点——为熟悉的数据获得快速且计算成本低的感知推理，同时保持迭代推理方案的上下文敏感性、精度和样本效率。此外，我们展示了我们的模型如何本质上对其不确定性敏感，并自适应地平衡迭代和摊销推理，以使用最小的计算费用获得准确的信念。混合预测编码为视觉感知过程中观察到的前馈和循环活动的功能相关性提供了新的视角，并为视觉现象学的不同方面提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合预测编码模型，结合摊销推理和迭代推理，以解决传统预测编码模型与快速视觉感知的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 传统预测编码模型认为感知需要多轮神经活动，但证据显示视觉感知的某些方面（如复杂物体识别）可在快速前馈过程中完成，无需大量递归活动，需调和这一矛盾。
AI.method: 构建混合预测编码网络，通过单一目标函数的双重优化，将前馈摊销推理与递归迭代推理统一，并利用局部赫布规则实现生物学可解释的贝叶斯推理架构。
AI.result: 模型在快速处理熟悉数据时计算高效，同时保持上下文敏感性和样本效率，能自适应平衡两种推理方式，以最小计算成本获得准确感知信念。
AI.conclusion: 混合预测编码为视觉感知中前馈与递归活动的功能意义提供新视角，并解释了视觉现象中不同方面的机制差异。

ai_content_json.method: 构建混合预测编码网络，通过单一目标函数的双重优化，将前馈摊销推理与递归迭代推理统一，并利用局部赫布规则实现生物学可解释的贝叶斯推理架构。
ai_content_json.result: 模型在快速处理熟悉数据时计算高效，同时保持上下文敏感性和样本效率，能自适应平衡两种推理方式，以最小计算成本获得准确感知信念。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 混合预测编码为视觉感知中前馈与递归活动的功能意义提供新视角，并解释了视觉现象中不同方面的机制差异。

tldr: 本文提出一种混合预测编码模型，结合摊销推理和迭代推理，以解决传统预测编码模型与快速视觉感知的矛盾。

method: 构建混合预测编码网络，通过单一目标函数的双重优化，将前馈摊销推理与递归迭代推理统一，并利用局部赫布规则实现生物学可解释的贝叶斯推理架构。
result: 模型在快速处理熟悉数据时计算高效，同时保持上下文敏感性和样本效率，能自适应平衡两种推理方式，以最小计算成本获得准确感知信念。
conclusion: 混合预测编码为视觉感知中前馈与递归活动的功能意义提供新视角，并解释了视觉现象中不同方面的机制差异。
search_text: Hybrid Predictive Coding: Inferring, Fast and Slow 混合预测编码：推断、快速和慢速 Predictive coding is an influential model of cortical neural activity. It proposes that perceptual beliefs are furnished by sequentially minimising "prediction errors" - the differences between predicted and observed data. Implicit in this proposal is the idea that perception requires multiple cycles of neural activity. This is at odds with evidence that several aspects of visual perception - including complex forms of object recognition - arise from an initial "feedforward sweep" that occurs on fast timescales which preclude substantial recurrent activity. Here, we propose that the feedforward sweep can be understood as performing amortized inference and recurrent processing can be understood as performing iterative inference. We propose a hybrid predictive coding network that combines both iterative and amortized inference in a principled manner by describing both in terms of a dual optimization of a single objective function. We show that the resulting scheme can be implemented in a biologically plausible neural architecture that approximates Bayesian inference utilising local Hebbian update rules. We demonstrate that our hybrid predictive coding model combines the benefits of both amortized and iterative inference -- obtaining rapid and computationally cheap perceptual inference for familiar data while maintaining the context-sensitivity, precision, and sample efficiency of iterative inference schemes. Moreover, we show how our model is inherently sensitive to its uncertainty and adaptively balances iterative and amortized inference to obtain accurate beliefs using minimum computational expense. Hybrid predictive coding offers a new perspective on the functional relevance of the feedforward and recurrent activity observed during visual perception and offers novel insights into distinct aspects of visual phenomenology. 预测编码是皮质神经活动的一个有影响力的模型。它提出，感知信念是通过依次最小化“预测误差”（预测数据与观察数据之间的差异）来提供的。该提议隐含的观点是感知需要多个神经活动周期。这与视觉感知的几个方面（包括复杂形式的物体识别）产生于快速时间尺度上发生的初始“前馈扫描”的证据相矛盾，这排除了大量的重复活动。在这里，我们建议前馈扫描可以理解为执行摊销推理，而循环处理可以理解为执行迭代推理。我们提出了一种混合预测编码网络，通过用单个目标函数的双重优化来描述迭代推理和摊销推理，以原则性的方式将两者结合起来。我们表明，所得到的方案可以在生物学上合理的神经架构中实现，该架构利用局部赫布更新规则来近似贝叶斯推理。我们证明了我们的混合预测编码模型结合了摊销推理和迭代推理的优点——为熟悉的数据获得快速且计算成本低的感知推理，同时保持迭代推理方案的上下文敏感性、精度和样本效率。此外，我们展示了我们的模型如何本质上对其不确定性敏感，并自适应地平衡迭代和摊销推理，以使用最小的计算费用获得准确的信念。混合预测编码为视觉感知过程中观察到的前馈和循环活动的功能相关性提供了新的视角，并为视觉现象学的不同方面提供了新的见解。 本文提出一种混合预测编码模型，结合摊销推理和迭代推理，以解决传统预测编码模型与快速视觉感知的矛盾。 Alexander Tschantz,Beren Millidge,Anil K Seth,Christopher L Buckley q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: SMORS: A soft multirotor UAV for multimodal locomotion and robust interaction
title_zh: SMORS：用于多模式运动和鲁棒交互的软多旋翼无人机
abstract: We present SMORS, the first Soft fully actuated MultirOtoR System for multimodal locomotion. Unlike conventional hexarotors, SMORS is equipped with three rigid and three continuously soft arms, with each arm hosting a propeller. We create a bridge between the fields of soft and aerial robotics by mechanically coupling the actuation of a fully actuated flying platform with the actuation of a soft robotic manipulator. Each rotor is slightly tilted, allowing for full actuation of the platform. The soft components combined with the platform's full actuation allow for a robust interaction, in the form of efficient multimodal locomotion. In this work, we present the dynamical model of the platform, derive a closed-loop control, and present simulation results fortifying the robustness of the platform under a jumping-flying maneuver. We demonstrate in simulations that our multimodal locomotion approach can be more energy-efficient than the flight with a hexarotor.
summary: We present SMORS, the first Soft fully actuated MultirOtoR System for multimodal locomotion. Unlike conventional hexarotors, SMORS is equipped with three rigid and three continuously soft arms, with each arm hosting a propeller. We create a bridge between the fields of soft and aerial robotics by mechanically coupling the actuation of a fully actuated flying platform with the actuation of a soft robotic manipulator. Each rotor is slightly tilted, allowing for full actuation of the platform. The soft components combined with the platform's full actuation allow for a robust interaction, in the form of efficient multimodal locomotion. In this work, we present the dynamical model of the platform, derive a closed-loop control, and present simulation results fortifying the robustness of the platform under a jumping-flying maneuver. We demonstrate in simulations that our multimodal locomotion approach can be more energy-efficient than the flight with a hexarotor.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 SMORS，这是第一个用于多模式运动的软式全驱动 MultirOtoR 系统。与传统的六旋翼飞行器不同，SMORS 配备了三个刚性臂和三个连续软臂，每个臂都装有一个螺旋桨。我们通过将全驱动飞行平台的驱动与软机器人操纵器的驱动机械耦合，在软机器人和空中机器人领域之间架起了一座桥梁。每个转子都稍微倾斜，允许平台完全驱动。软组件与平台的完全驱动相结合，以高效的多模式运动的形式实现稳健的交互。在这项工作中，我们提出了平台的动力学模型，推导了闭环控制，并提出了增强平台在跳跃飞行机动下的鲁棒性的仿真结果。我们在模拟中证明，我们的多模式运动方法比六旋翼飞行器的飞行更节能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMORS，一种结合软体机器人和多旋翼飞行器的新型多模态移动系统。
AI.motivation: 传统多旋翼飞行器在复杂环境中的交互能力有限，而软体机器人具备柔性和适应性，需融合两者优势以实现更鲁棒的多模态移动。
AI.method: 设计包含三刚性臂和三柔性臂的多旋翼结构，通过全驱动平台与软体机械臂的机械耦合实现控制，建立动力学模型并开发闭环控制算法，通过仿真验证性能。
AI.result: 仿真表明，SMORS在跳跃-飞行复合机动中表现出更强的鲁棒性，且多模态移动方式相比六旋翼飞行更节能。
AI.conclusion: SMORS成功融合软体机器人与空中机器人技术，为复杂环境下的高效移动与交互提供了新方案。

title: Joint Learning of Feature Extraction and Cost Aggregation for Semantic Correspondence
title_zh: 语义对应的特征提取和成本聚合的联合学习
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2022
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2022
abstract: Establishing dense correspondences across semantically similar images is one of the challenging tasks due to the significant intra-class variations and background clutters. To solve these problems, numerous methods have been proposed, focused on learning feature extractor or cost aggregation independently, which yields sub-optimal performance. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for jointly learning feature extraction and cost aggregation for semantic correspondence. By exploiting the pseudo labels from each module, the networks consisting of feature extraction and cost aggregation modules are simultaneously learned in a boosting fashion. Moreover, to ignore unreliable pseudo labels, we present a confidence-aware contrastive loss function for learning the networks in a weakly-supervised manner. We demonstrate our competitive results on standard benchmarks for semantic correspondence.
summary: Establishing dense correspondences across semantically similar images is one of the challenging tasks due to the significant intra-class variations and background clutters. To solve these problems, numerous methods have been proposed, focused on learning feature extractor or cost aggregation independently, which yields sub-optimal performance. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for jointly learning feature extraction and cost aggregation for semantic correspondence. By exploiting the pseudo labels from each module, the networks consisting of feature extraction and cost aggregation modules are simultaneously learned in a boosting fashion. Moreover, to ignore unreliable pseudo labels, we present a confidence-aware contrastive loss function for learning the networks in a weakly-supervised manner. We demonstrate our competitive results on standard benchmarks for semantic correspondence.
abstract_zh: 由于显着的类内变化和背景混乱，在语义相似的图像之间建立密集的对应关系是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了解决这些问题，人们提出了许多方法，专注于独立学习特征提取器或成本聚合，这会产生次优的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种联合学习语义对应的特征提取和成本聚合的新框架。通过利用每个模块的伪标签，由特征提取和成本聚合模块组成的网络以增强方式同时学习。此外，为了忽略不可靠的伪标签，我们提出了一种置信感知对比损失函数，用于以弱监督的方式学习网络。我们在语义对应的标准基准上展示了我们的竞争结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合学习特征提取与代价聚合的框架，用于解决语义图像间密集对应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别独立学习特征提取或代价聚合模块，导致性能次优，难以应对类内差异和背景干扰。
AI.method: 设计联合学习框架，通过模块间伪标签增强学习，并引入置信度感知对比损失函数实现弱监督训练。
AI.result: 在标准语义对应基准测试中取得具有竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化特征提取与代价聚合能有效提升语义对应性能，置信度感知损失为弱监督学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Mohamed Adel Musallam,Vincent Gaudilliere,Miguel Ortiz del Castillo,Kassem Al Ismaeil,Djamila Aouada
title: Leveraging Equivariant Features for Absolute Pose Regression
title_zh: 利用等变特征进行绝对姿态回归
abstract: While end-to-end approaches have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many perception tasks, they are not yet able to compete with 3D geometry-based methods in pose estimation. Moreover, absolute pose regression has been shown to be more related to image retrieval. As a result, we hypothesize that the statistical features learned by classical Convolutional Neural Networks do not carry enough geometric information to reliably solve this inherently geometric task. In this paper, we demonstrate how a translation and rotation equivariant Convolutional Neural Network directly induces representations of camera motions into the feature space. We then show that this geometric property allows for implicitly augmenting the training data under a whole group of image plane-preserving transformations. Therefore, we argue that directly learning equivariant features is preferable than learning data-intensive intermediate representations. Comprehensive experimental validation demonstrates that our lightweight model outperforms existing ones on standard datasets.
summary: While end-to-end approaches have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many perception tasks, they are not yet able to compete with 3D geometry-based methods in pose estimation. Moreover, absolute pose regression has been shown to be more related to image retrieval. As a result, we hypothesize that the statistical features learned by classical Convolutional Neural Networks do not carry enough geometric information to reliably solve this inherently geometric task. In this paper, we demonstrate how a translation and rotation equivariant Convolutional Neural Network directly induces representations of camera motions into the feature space. We then show that this geometric property allows for implicitly augmenting the training data under a whole group of image plane-preserving transformations. Therefore, we argue that directly learning equivariant features is preferable than learning data-intensive intermediate representations. Comprehensive experimental validation demonstrates that our lightweight model outperforms existing ones on standard datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然端到端方法在许多感知任务中实现了最先进的性能，但它们在姿态估计方面尚无法与基于 3D 几何的方法竞争。此外，绝对姿态回归已被证明与图像检索更相关。因此，我们假设经典卷积神经网络学习的统计特征没有携带足够的几何信息来可靠地解决这种固有的几何任务。在本文中，我们演示了平移和旋转等变卷积神经网络如何直接将相机运动的表示引入特征空间。然后我们证明，这种几何属性允许在整组图像平面保留变换下隐式增强训练数据。因此，我们认为直接学习等变特征比学习数据密集型中间表示更可取。全面的实验验证表明，我们的轻量级模型在标准数据集上优于现有模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用平移和旋转等变卷积神经网络进行绝对姿态回归，以提升姿态估计的几何信息表达能力。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN的统计特征缺乏足够几何信息，难以胜任本质几何任务的绝对姿态回归，而图像检索相关性表明需强化几何属性学习。
AI.method: 设计具有平移和旋转等变特性的卷积网络，直接编码相机运动至特征空间，并通过几何不变性隐式增强训练数据。
AI.result: 轻量级模型在标准数据集上超越现有方法，验证了等变特征学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 直接学习等变特征优于传统中间表示，为几何驱动的视觉任务提供新范式。

search_text: Leveraging Equivariant Features for Absolute Pose Regression 利用等变特征进行绝对姿态回归 While end-to-end approaches have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many perception tasks, they are not yet able to compete with 3D geometry-based methods in pose estimation. Moreover, absolute pose regression has been shown to be more related to image retrieval. As a result, we hypothesize that the statistical features learned by classical Convolutional Neural Networks do not carry enough geometric information to reliably solve this inherently geometric task. In this paper, we demonstrate how a translation and rotation equivariant Convolutional Neural Network directly induces representations of camera motions into the feature space. We then show that this geometric property allows for implicitly augmenting the training data under a whole group of image plane-preserving transformations. Therefore, we argue that directly learning equivariant features is preferable than learning data-intensive intermediate representations. Comprehensive experimental validation demonstrates that our lightweight model outperforms existing ones on standard datasets. 虽然端到端方法在许多感知任务中实现了最先进的性能，但它们在姿态估计方面尚无法与基于 3D 几何的方法竞争。此外，绝对姿态回归已被证明与图像检索更相关。因此，我们假设经典卷积神经网络学习的统计特征没有携带足够的几何信息来可靠地解决这种固有的几何任务。在本文中，我们演示了平移和旋转等变卷积神经网络如何直接将相机运动的表示引入特征空间。然后我们证明，这种几何属性允许在整组图像平面保留变换下隐式增强训练数据。因此，我们认为直接学习等变特征比学习数据密集型中间表示更可取。全面的实验验证表明，我们的轻量级模型在标准数据集上优于现有模型。 本文提出利用平移和旋转等变卷积神经网络进行绝对姿态回归，以提升姿态估计的几何信息表达能力。 Mohamed Adel Musallam,Vincent Gaudilliere,Miguel Ortiz del Castillo,Kassem Al Ismaeil,Djamila Aouada cs.CV

title: Positive and Negative Critiquing for VAE-based Recommenders
title_zh: 对基于 VAE 的推荐系统的正面和负面批评
abstract: Providing explanations for recommended items allows users to refine the recommendations by critiquing parts of the explanations. As a result of revisiting critiquing from the perspective of multimodal generative models, recent work has proposed M&Ms-VAE, which achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of recommendation, explanation, and critiquing. M&Ms-VAE and similar models allow users to negatively critique (i.e., explicitly disagree). However, they share a significant drawback: users cannot positively critique (i.e., highlight a desired feature). We address this deficiency with M&Ms-VAE+, an extension of M&Ms-VAE that enables positive and negative critiquing. In addition to modeling users' interactions and keyphrase-usage preferences, we model their keyphrase-usage dislikes. Moreover, we design a novel critiquing module that is trained in a self-supervised fashion. Our experiments on two datasets show that M&Ms-VAE+ matches or exceeds M&Ms-VAE in recommendation and explanation performance. Furthermore, our results demonstrate that representing positive and negative critiques differently enables M&Ms-VAE+ to significantly outperform M&Ms-VAE and other models in positive and negative multi-step critiquing.
summary: Providing explanations for recommended items allows users to refine the recommendations by critiquing parts of the explanations. As a result of revisiting critiquing from the perspective of multimodal generative models, recent work has proposed M&Ms-VAE, which achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of recommendation, explanation, and critiquing. M&Ms-VAE and similar models allow users to negatively critique (i.e., explicitly disagree). However, they share a significant drawback: users cannot positively critique (i.e., highlight a desired feature). We address this deficiency with M&Ms-VAE+, an extension of M&Ms-VAE that enables positive and negative critiquing. In addition to modeling users' interactions and keyphrase-usage preferences, we model their keyphrase-usage dislikes. Moreover, we design a novel critiquing module that is trained in a self-supervised fashion. Our experiments on two datasets show that M&Ms-VAE+ matches or exceeds M&Ms-VAE in recommendation and explanation performance. Furthermore, our results demonstrate that representing positive and negative critiques differently enables M&Ms-VAE+ to significantly outperform M&Ms-VAE and other models in positive and negative multi-step critiquing.
abstract_zh: 为推荐项目提供解释允许用户通过批评部分解释来完善推荐。作为从多模态生成模型的角度重新审视批评的结果，最近的工作提出了 M&Ms-VAE，它在推荐、解释和批评方面实现了最先进的性能。 M&Ms-VAE 和类似模型允许用户进行负面批评（即明确不同意）。然而，它们有一个显着的缺点：用户无法积极批评（即突出显示所需的功能）。我们通过 M&Ms-VAE+ 解决了这一缺陷，它是 M&Ms-VAE 的扩展，可以进行正面和负面批评。除了对用户的交互和关键词使用偏好进行建模之外，我们还对他们对关键词使用的不喜欢进行建模。此外，我们设计了一个新颖的批评模块，以自我监督的方式进行训练。我们对两个数据集的实验表明，M&Ms-VAE+ 在推荐和解释性能方面匹配或超过了 M&Ms-VAE。此外，我们的结果表明，以不同方式表示正面和负面批评使 M&Ms-VAE+ 在正面和负面多步骤批评中显着优于 M&Ms-VAE 和其他模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出M&Ms-VAE+模型，扩展基于VAE的推荐系统，支持正反两种批评方式以提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有模型仅支持负面批评，无法捕捉用户正面偏好，限制了推荐系统的优化。
AI.method: 提出M&Ms-VAE+，建模用户对关键词的喜好与厌恶，设计自监督训练的批评模块以处理正反反馈。
AI.result: 实验表明，M&Ms-VAE+在推荐和解释任务上匹配或超越原模型，且在多步骤正反批评中显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 同时建模正反批评可有效提升推荐系统性能，未来可探索更多用户反馈形式。

authors_text: Takaaki Saeki,Detai Xin,Wataru Nakata,Tomoki Koriyama,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: UTMOS: UTokyo-SaruLab System for VoiceMOS Challenge 2022
title_zh: UTMOS：2022 年 VoiceMOS 挑战赛的 UTokyo-SaruLab 系统
abstract: We present the UTokyo-SaruLab mean opinion score (MOS) prediction system submitted to VoiceMOS Challenge 2022. The challenge is to predict the MOS values of speech samples collected from previous Blizzard Challenges and Voice Conversion Challenges for two tracks: a main track for in-domain prediction and an out-of-domain (OOD) track for which there is less labeled data from different listening tests. Our system is based on ensemble learning of strong and weak learners. Strong learners incorporate several improvements to the previous fine-tuning models of self-supervised learning (SSL) models, while weak learners use basic machine-learning methods to predict scores from SSL features. In the Challenge, our system had the highest score on several metrics for both the main and OOD tracks. In addition, we conducted ablation studies to investigate the effectiveness of our proposed methods.
summary: We present the UTokyo-SaruLab mean opinion score (MOS) prediction system submitted to VoiceMOS Challenge 2022. The challenge is to predict the MOS values of speech samples collected from previous Blizzard Challenges and Voice Conversion Challenges for two tracks: a main track for in-domain prediction and an out-of-domain (OOD) track for which there is less labeled data from different listening tests. Our system is based on ensemble learning of strong and weak learners. Strong learners incorporate several improvements to the previous fine-tuning models of self-supervised learning (SSL) models, while weak learners use basic machine-learning methods to predict scores from SSL features. In the Challenge, our system had the highest score on several metrics for both the main and OOD tracks. In addition, we conducted ablation studies to investigate the effectiveness of our proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了提交给 VoiceMOS Challenge 2022 的 UTokyo-SaruLab 平均意见得分 (MOS) 预测系统。挑战是预测从之前的暴雪挑战赛和语音转换挑战赛中收集的两个轨道的语音样本的 MOS 值：一个用于域内预测的主轨道和一个域外 (OOD) 轨道，其中来自不同听力测试的标记数据较少。我们的系统基于强学习器和弱学习器的集成学习。强学习者对之前的自监督学习 (SSL) 模型的微调模型进行了多项改进，而弱学习者则使用基本的机器学习方法来根据 SSL 特征预测分数。在挑战赛中，我们的系统在主赛道和 OOD 赛道的多个指标上都获得了最高分。此外，我们还进行了消融研究，以调查我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了UTokyo-SaruLab团队在VoiceMOS挑战赛2022中提交的语音MOS评分预测系统，针对领域内和领域外两种任务进行建模。
AI.motivation: 语音质量评估需要准确预测MOS分数，但领域外数据因标注稀缺而更具挑战性，需探索有效方法应对数据分布差异。
AI.method: 采用强弱学习器集成方法，强学习器改进自监督学习模型的微调策略，弱学习器基于SSL特征使用基础机器学习方法预测得分。
AI.result: 系统在主赛道和领域外赛道多项指标中均取得最高分，消融实验证实了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 集成学习框架结合SSL特征能有效提升MOS预测性能，尤其在标注数据有限的领域外场景中表现突出。

The challenge is to predict the MOS values of speech samples collected from previous Blizzard Challenges and Voice Conversion Challenges for two tracks: a main track for in-domain prediction and an out-of-domain (OOD) track for which there is less labeled data from different listening tests. Our system is based on ensemble learning of strong and weak learners. Strong learners incorporate several improvements to the previous fine-tuning models of self-supervised learning (SSL) models, while weak learners use basic machine-learning methods to predict scores from SSL features. In the Challenge, our system had the highest score on several metrics for both the main and OOD tracks. In addition, we conducted ablation studies to investigate the effectiveness of our proposed methods. 我们提出了提交给 VoiceMOS Challenge 2022 的 UTokyo-SaruLab 平均意见得分 (MOS) 预测系统。挑战是预测从之前的暴雪挑战赛和语音转换挑战赛中收集的两个轨道的语音样本的 MOS 值：一个用于域内预测的主轨道和一个域外 (OOD) 轨道，其中来自不同听力测试的标记数据较少。我们的系统基于强学习器和弱学习器的集成学习。强学习者对之前的自监督学习 (SSL) 模型的微调模型进行了多项改进，而弱学习者则使用基本的机器学习方法来根据 SSL 特征预测分数。在挑战赛中，我们的系统在主赛道和 OOD 赛道的多个指标上都获得了最高分。此外，我们还进行了消融研究，以调查我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文介绍了UTokyo-SaruLab团队在VoiceMOS挑战赛2022中提交的语音MOS评分预测系统，针对领域内和领域外两种任务进行建模。 Takaaki Saeki,Detai Xin,Wataru Nakata,Tomoki Koriyama,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Hiroshi Saruwatari cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Automatic Image Content Extraction: Operationalizing Machine Learning in Humanistic Photographic Studies of Large Visual Archives
title_zh: 自动图像内容提取：在大型视觉档案的人文摄影研究中运用机器学习
abstract: Applying machine learning tools to digitized image archives has a potential to revolutionize quantitative research of visual studies in humanities and social sciences. The ability to process a hundredfold greater number of photos than has been traditionally possible and to analyze them with an extensive set of variables will contribute to deeper insight into the material. Overall, these changes will help to shift the workflow from simple manual tasks to more demanding stages. In this paper, we introduce Automatic Image Content Extraction (AICE) framework for machine learning-based search and analysis of large image archives. We developed the framework in a multidisciplinary research project as framework for future photographic studies by reformulating and expanding the traditional visual content analysis methodologies to be compatible with the current and emerging state-of-the-art machine learning tools and to cover the novel machine learning opportunities for automatic content analysis. The proposed framework can be applied in several domains in humanities and social sciences, and it can be adjusted and scaled into various research settings. We also provide information on the current state of different machine learning techniques and show that there are already various publicly available methods that are suitable to a wide-scale of visual content analysis tasks.
summary: Applying machine learning tools to digitized image archives has a potential to revolutionize quantitative research of visual studies in humanities and social sciences. The ability to process a hundredfold greater number of photos than has been traditionally possible and to analyze them with an extensive set of variables will contribute to deeper insight into the material. Overall, these changes will help to shift the workflow from simple manual tasks to more demanding stages. In this paper, we introduce Automatic Image Content Extraction (AICE) framework for machine learning-based search and analysis of large image archives. We developed the framework in a multidisciplinary research project as framework for future photographic studies by reformulating and expanding the traditional visual content analysis methodologies to be compatible with the current and emerging state-of-the-art machine learning tools and to cover the novel machine learning opportunities for automatic content analysis. The proposed framework can be applied in several domains in humanities and social sciences, and it can be adjusted and scaled into various research settings. We also provide information on the current state of different machine learning techniques and show that there are already various publicly available methods that are suitable to a wide-scale of visual content analysis tasks.
abstract_zh: 将机器学习工具应用于数字化图像档案有可能彻底改变人文和社会科学中视觉研究的定量研究。处理比传统技术多一百倍的照片并使用大量变量进行分析的能力将有助于更深入地了解材料。总体而言，这些变化将有助于将工作流程从简单的手动任务转变为要求更高的阶段。在本文中，我们介绍了自动图像内容提取（AICE）框架，用于基于机器学习的大型图像档案搜索和分析。我们在一个多学科研究项目中开发了该框架，作为未来摄影研究的框架，通过重新制定和扩展传统的视觉内容分析方法，以与当前和新兴的最先进的机器学习工具兼容，并涵盖自动内容分析的新颖机器学习机会。所提出的框架可以应用于人文和社会科学的多个领域，并且可以根据不同的研究环境进行调整和扩展。我们还提供了有关不同机器学习技术当前状态的信息，并表明已经有各种公开可用的方法适合广泛的视觉内容分析任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的自动图像内容提取（AICE）框架，用于处理和分析大规模视觉档案，以推动人文学科和社科领域的定量研究。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理大规模图像档案和复杂变量，而机器学习工具可显著提升处理效率和分析深度，从而推动研究从基础手动任务转向更高层次的分析。
AI.method: 通过跨学科研究，重构和扩展传统视觉分析方法，使其兼容当前先进的机器学习工具，并开发可适应多种研究场景的AICE框架。
AI.result: AICE框架可应用于人文学科和社科领域，具备可调整和扩展性；同时梳理了现有机器学习技术，证明其适用于大规模视觉分析任务。
AI.conclusion: AICE框架通过机器学习技术革新了视觉档案研究流程，为大规模图像分析提供了可扩展的解决方案，推动人文学科研究向量化和智能化发展。

authors_text: Mingfei Han,David Junhao Zhang,Yali Wang,Rui Yan,Lina Yao,Xiaojun Chang,Yu Qiao
title: Dual-AI: Dual-path Actor Interaction Learning for Group Activity Recognition
title_zh: Dual-AI：用于群体活动识别的双路径演员交互学习
abstract: Learning spatial-temporal relation among multiple actors is crucial for group activity recognition. Different group activities often show the diversified interactions between actors in the video. Hence, it is often difficult to model complex group activities from a single view of spatial-temporal actor evolution. To tackle this problem, we propose a distinct Dual-path Actor Interaction (DualAI) framework, which flexibly arranges spatial and temporal transformers in two complementary orders, enhancing actor relations by integrating merits from different spatiotemporal paths. Moreover, we introduce a novel Multi-scale Actor Contrastive Loss (MAC-Loss) between two interactive paths of Dual-AI. Via self-supervised actor consistency in both frame and video levels, MAC-Loss can effectively distinguish individual actor representations to reduce action confusion among different actors. Consequently, our Dual-AI can boost group activity recognition by fusing such discriminative features of different actors. To evaluate the proposed approach, we conduct extensive experiments on the widely used benchmarks, including Volleyball, Collective Activity, and NBA datasets. The proposed Dual-AI achieves state-of-the-art performance on all these datasets. It is worth noting the proposed Dual-AI with 50% training data outperforms a number of recent approaches with 100% training data. This confirms the generalization power of Dual-AI for group activity recognition, even under the challenging scenarios of limited supervision.
summary: Learning spatial-temporal relation among multiple actors is crucial for group activity recognition. Different group activities often show the diversified interactions between actors in the video. Hence, it is often difficult to model complex group activities from a single view of spatial-temporal actor evolution. To tackle this problem, we propose a distinct Dual-path Actor Interaction (DualAI) framework, which flexibly arranges spatial and temporal transformers in two complementary orders, enhancing actor relations by integrating merits from different spatiotemporal paths. Moreover, we introduce a novel Multi-scale Actor Contrastive Loss (MAC-Loss) between two interactive paths of Dual-AI. Via self-supervised actor consistency in both frame and video levels, MAC-Loss can effectively distinguish individual actor representations to reduce action confusion among different actors. Consequently, our Dual-AI can boost group activity recognition by fusing such discriminative features of different actors. To evaluate the proposed approach, we conduct extensive experiments on the widely used benchmarks, including Volleyball, Collective Activity, and NBA datasets. The proposed Dual-AI achieves state-of-the-art performance on all these datasets. It is worth noting the proposed Dual-AI with 50% training data outperforms a number of recent approaches with 100% training data. This confirms the generalization power of Dual-AI for group activity recognition, even under the challenging scenarios of limited supervision.
abstract_zh: 学习多个参与者之间的时空关系对于群体活动识别至关重要。不同的群体活动往往会在视频中展现出演员之间多样化的互动。因此，通常很难从时空参与者演化的单一角度对复杂的群体活动进行建模。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种独特的双路径演员交互（DualAI）框架，该框架以两个互补的顺序灵活地安排空间和时间转换器，通过整合不同时空路径的优点来增强演员关系。此外，我们在双人工智能的两个交互路径之间引入了一种新颖的多尺度演员对比损失（MAC-Loss）。通过帧和视频级别的自监督演员一致性，MAC-Loss 可以有效区分各个演员的表示，以减少不同演员之间的动作混淆。因此，我们的双人工智能可以通过融合不同参与者的这种区分特征来提高群体活动识别能力。为了评估所提出的方法，我们对广泛使用的基准进行了广泛的实验，包括排球、集体活动和 NBA 数据集。所提出的双人工智能在所有这些数据集上实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，所提出的具有 50% 训练数据的 Dual-AI 优于许多具有 100% 训练数据的最新方法。这证实了双人工智能在群体活动识别方面的泛化能力，即使在有限监督的挑战性场景下也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dual-AI框架，通过双路径交互学习和多尺度对比损失提升群体活动识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以建模复杂群体活动中的多样化时空交互关系，单一视角易导致动作混淆。
AI.method: 设计双路径架构交替融合时空转换器，并引入MAC-Loss通过帧级/视频级自监督学习区分个体特征。
AI.result: 在Volleyball、Collective Activity和NBA数据集上达到SOTA，50%训练数据下优于其他方法100%数据表现。
AI.conclusion: Dual-AI通过双路径交互与对比学习有效提升群体活动识别，尤其在数据稀缺场景下具有显著优势。

authors_text: Dongchao Yang,Helin Wang,Zhongjie Ye,Yuexian Zou,Wenwu Wang
title: RaDur: A Reference-aware and Duration-robust Network for Target Sound Detection
title_zh: RaDur：用于目标声音检测的参考感知和持续时间稳健的网络
abstract: Target sound detection (TSD) aims to detect the target sound from a mixture audio given the reference information. Previous methods use a conditional network to extract a sound-discriminative embedding from the reference audio, and then use it to detect the target sound from the mixture audio. However, the network performs much differently when using different reference audios (e.g. performs poorly for noisy and short-duration reference audios), and tends to make wrong decisions for transient events (i.e. shorter than $1$ second). To overcome these problems, in this paper, we present a reference-aware and duration-robust network (RaDur) for TSD. More specifically, in order to make the network more aware of the reference information, we propose an embedding enhancement module to take into account the mixture audio while generating the embedding, and apply the attention pooling to enhance the features of target sound-related frames and weaken the features of noisy frames. In addition, a duration-robust focal loss is proposed to help model different-duration events. To evaluate our method, we build two TSD datasets based on UrbanSound and Audioset. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our methods.
summary: Target sound detection (TSD) aims to detect the target sound from a mixture audio given the reference information. Previous methods use a conditional network to extract a sound-discriminative embedding from the reference audio, and then use it to detect the target sound from the mixture audio. However, the network performs much differently when using different reference audios (e.g. performs poorly for noisy and short-duration reference audios), and tends to make wrong decisions for transient events (i.e. shorter than $1$ second). To overcome these problems, in this paper, we present a reference-aware and duration-robust network (RaDur) for TSD. More specifically, in order to make the network more aware of the reference information, we propose an embedding enhancement module to take into account the mixture audio while generating the embedding, and apply the attention pooling to enhance the features of target sound-related frames and weaken the features of noisy frames. In addition, a duration-robust focal loss is proposed to help model different-duration events. To evaluate our method, we build two TSD datasets based on UrbanSound and Audioset. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our methods.
abstract_zh: 目标声音检测（TSD）旨在从给定参考信息的混合音频中检测目标声音。以前的方法使用条件网络从参考音频中提取声音辨别嵌入，然后用它从混合音频中检测目标声音。然而，当使用不同的参考音频时，网络的表现有很大不同（例如，对于嘈杂和短持续时间的参考音频表现不佳），并且往往会对瞬态事件（即短于 1 美元秒）做出错误的决定。为了克服这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 TSD 的参考感知和持续时间鲁棒网络（RaDur）。更具体地说，为了使网络更加了解参考信息，我们提出了一个嵌入增强模块，在生成嵌入时考虑混合音频，并应用注意力池来增强目标声音相关帧的特征并削弱噪声帧的特征。此外，提出了持续时间鲁棒的焦点损失来帮助模拟不同持续时间的事件。为了评估我们的方法，我们基于 UrbanSound 和 Audioset 构建了两个 TSD 数据集。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种参考感知且时长鲁棒的网络RaDur，用于在混合音频中检测目标声音，解决现有方法在不同参考音频和瞬态事件上的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理不同参考音频（如噪声大或短时长）时性能不稳定，且对瞬态事件（短于1秒）检测效果差，需提升网络对参考信息的感知能力和时长鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计嵌入增强模块结合混合音频生成参考嵌入，应用注意力池化增强目标声音帧特征；提出时长鲁棒焦点损失处理不同持续时间事件。
AI.result: 基于UrbanSound和Audioset构建数据集，实验验证方法在目标声检测任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RaDur通过提升参考信息感知和时长鲁棒性，有效解决现有方法在不同参考音频及瞬态事件上的缺陷，推动目标声检测技术进步。

title: Detector-Free Weakly Supervised Group Activity Recognition
title_zh: 无探测器弱监督群体活动识别
abstract: Group activity recognition is the task of understanding the activity conducted by a group of people as a whole in a multi-person video. Existing models for this task are often impractical in that they demand ground-truth bounding box labels of actors even in testing or rely on off-the-shelf object detectors. Motivated by this, we propose a novel model for group activity recognition that depends neither on bounding box labels nor on object detector. Our model based on Transformer localizes and encodes partial contexts of a group activity by leveraging the attention mechanism, and represents a video clip as a set of partial context embeddings. The embedding vectors are then aggregated to form a single group representation that reflects the entire context of an activity while capturing temporal evolution of each partial context. Our method achieves outstanding performance on two benchmarks, Volleyball and NBA datasets, surpassing not only the state of the art trained with the same level of supervision, but also some of existing models relying on stronger supervision.
summary: Group activity recognition is the task of understanding the activity conducted by a group of people as a whole in a multi-person video. Existing models for this task are often impractical in that they demand ground-truth bounding box labels of actors even in testing or rely on off-the-shelf object detectors. Motivated by this, we propose a novel model for group activity recognition that depends neither on bounding box labels nor on object detector. Our model based on Transformer localizes and encodes partial contexts of a group activity by leveraging the attention mechanism, and represents a video clip as a set of partial context embeddings. The embedding vectors are then aggregated to form a single group representation that reflects the entire context of an activity while capturing temporal evolution of each partial context. Our method achieves outstanding performance on two benchmarks, Volleyball and NBA datasets, surpassing not only the state of the art trained with the same level of supervision, but also some of existing models relying on stronger supervision.
abstract_zh: 群体活动识别是在多人视频中理解一群人作为一个整体进行的活动的任务。此任务的现有模型通常不切实际，因为即使在测试中，它们也需要参与者的真实边界框标签或依赖现成的对象检测器。受此启发，我们提出了一种新的群体活动识别模型，该模型既不依赖于边界框标签，也不依赖于对象检测器。我们基于 Transformer 的模型通过利用注意力机制对群体活动的部分上下文进行本地化和编码，并将视频剪辑表示为一组部分上下文嵌入。然后，嵌入向量被聚合以形成单个组表示，该组表示反映活动的整个上下文，同时捕获每个部分上下文的时间演变。我们的方法在排球和 NBA 数据集这两个基准上取得了出色的表现，不仅超越了在相同监督水平下训练的最先进模型，而且还超越了一些依赖于更强监督的现有模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需目标检测器和边界框标签的弱监督群体活动识别方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖真实边界框标签或预训练检测器，导致实用性受限，因此提出无需这些的新型模型
AI.method: 基于Transformer的模型利用注意力机制定位部分上下文，生成嵌入向量并聚合为群体表示，捕捉时间演变
AI.result: 在Volleyball和NBA数据集上表现优于同类方法，甚至超越部分强监督模型
AI.conclusion: 证明了无需检测器和边界框标签的弱监督方法在群体活动识别中的有效性

title: Overcoming Catastrophic Forgetting in Incremental Object Detection via Elastic Response Distillation
title_zh: 通过弹性响应蒸馏克服增量目标检测中的灾难性遗忘
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.13471
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.13471
abstract: Traditional object detectors are ill-equipped for incremental learning. However, fine-tuning directly on a well-trained detection model with only new data will lead to catastrophic forgetting. Knowledge distillation is a flexible way to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. In Incremental Object Detection (IOD), previous work mainly focuses on distilling for the combination of features and responses. However, they under-explore the information that contains in responses. In this paper, we propose a response-based incremental distillation method, dubbed Elastic Response Distillation (ERD), which focuses on elastically learning responses from the classification head and the regression head. Firstly, our method transfers category knowledge while equipping student detector with the ability to retain localization information during incremental learning. In addition, we further evaluate the quality of all locations and provide valuable responses by the Elastic Response Selection (ERS) strategy. Finally, we elucidate that the knowledge from different responses should be assigned with different importance during incremental distillation. Extensive experiments conducted on MS COCO demonstrate our method achieves state-of-the-art result, which substantially narrows the performance gap towards full training.
summary: Traditional object detectors are ill-equipped for incremental learning. However, fine-tuning directly on a well-trained detection model with only new data will lead to catastrophic forgetting. Knowledge distillation is a flexible way to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. In Incremental Object Detection (IOD), previous work mainly focuses on distilling for the combination of features and responses. However, they under-explore the information that contains in responses. In this paper, we propose a response-based incremental distillation method, dubbed Elastic Response Distillation (ERD), which focuses on elastically learning responses from the classification head and the regression head. Firstly, our method transfers category knowledge while equipping student detector with the ability to retain localization information during incremental learning. In addition, we further evaluate the quality of all locations and provide valuable responses by the Elastic Response Selection (ERS) strategy. Finally, we elucidate that the knowledge from different responses should be assigned with different importance during incremental distillation. Extensive experiments conducted on MS COCO demonstrate our method achieves state-of-the-art result, which substantially narrows the performance gap towards full training.
abstract_zh: 传统的物体检测器不适合增量学习。然而，直接使用新数据对训练有素的检测模型进行微调将导致灾难性的遗忘。知识蒸馏是减轻灾难性遗忘的灵活方法。在增量目标检测（IOD）中，之前的工作主要集中在特征和响应的组合的蒸馏上。然而，他们对响应中包含的信息探索不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于响应的增量蒸馏方法，称为弹性响应蒸馏（ERD），其重点是弹性学习来自分类头和回归头的响应。首先，我们的方法传递类别知识，同时使学生检测器能够在增量学习期间保留本地化信息。此外，我们还进一步评估所有地点的质量，并通过弹性响应选择（ERS）策略提供有价值的响应。最后，我们阐明在增量蒸馏过程中，来自不同响应的知识应该被赋予不同的重要性。在 MS COCO 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法取得了最先进的结果，这大大缩小了与全面训练的性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于弹性响应蒸馏（ERD）的方法，用于解决增量目标检测中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测器在增量学习中容易出现灾难性遗忘，而现有知识蒸馏方法未充分挖掘响应信息的价值。
AI.method: 通过弹性响应蒸馏（ERD）从分类头和回归头中学习响应，结合弹性响应选择（ERS）策略评估响应质量，并为不同响应分配不同重要性权重。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上取得最先进的结果，显著缩小了与完整训练模型的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: ERD方法通过聚焦响应信息有效缓解了增量检测中的灾难性遗忘问题，实验验证了其有效性。

ai_content.method: 通过弹性响应蒸馏（ERD）从分类头和回归头中学习响应，结合弹性响应选择（ERS）策略评估响应质量，并为不同响应分配不同重要性权重。
ai_content.result: 在MS COCO数据集上取得最先进的结果，显著缩小了与完整训练模型的性能差距。
ai_content.conclusion: ERD方法通过聚焦响应信息有效缓解了增量检测中的灾难性遗忘问题，实验验证了其有效性。
