ai_content_json.result: 在MS COCO数据集上取得最先进的结果，显著缩小了与完整训练模型的性能差距。
ai_content_json.conclusion: ERD方法通过聚焦响应信息有效缓解了增量检测中的灾难性遗忘问题，实验验证了其有效性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于弹性响应蒸馏（ERD）的方法，用于解决增量目标检测中的灾难性遗忘问题。
motivation: 传统目标检测器在增量学习中容易出现灾难性遗忘，而现有知识蒸馏方法未充分挖掘响应信息的价值。
method: 通过弹性响应蒸馏（ERD）从分类头和回归头中学习响应，结合弹性响应选择（ERS）策略评估响应质量，并为不同响应分配不同重要性权重。
result: 在MS COCO数据集上取得最先进的结果，显著缩小了与完整训练模型的性能差距。
conclusion: ERD方法通过聚焦响应信息有效缓解了增量检测中的灾难性遗忘问题，实验验证了其有效性。
search_text: Overcoming Catastrophic Forgetting in Incremental Object Detection via Elastic Response Distillation 通过弹性响应蒸馏克服增量目标检测中的灾难性遗忘 Traditional object detectors are ill-equipped for incremental learning. However, fine-tuning directly on a well-trained detection model with only new data will lead to catastrophic forgetting. Knowledge distillation is a flexible way to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. In Incremental Object Detection (IOD), previous work mainly focuses on distilling for the combination of features and responses. However, they under-explore the information that contains in responses. In this paper, we propose a response-based incremental distillation method, dubbed Elastic Response Distillation (ERD), which focuses on elastically learning responses from the classification head and the regression head. Firstly, our method transfers category knowledge while equipping student detector with the ability to retain localization information during incremental learning. In addition, we further evaluate the quality of all locations and provide valuable responses by the Elastic Response Selection (ERS) strategy. Finally, we elucidate that the knowledge from different responses should be assigned with different importance during incremental distillation. Extensive experiments conducted on MS COCO demonstrate our method achieves state-of-the-art result, which substantially narrows the performance gap towards full training. 传统的物体检测器不适合增量学习。然而，直接使用新数据对训练有素的检测模型进行微调将导致灾难性的遗忘。知识蒸馏是减轻灾难性遗忘的灵活方法。在增量目标检测（IOD）中，之前的工作主要集中在特征和响应的组合的蒸馏上。然而，他们对响应中包含的信息探索不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于响应的增量蒸馏方法，称为弹性响应蒸馏（ERD），其重点是弹性学习来自分类头和回归头的响应。首先，我们的方法传递类别知识，同时使学生检测器能够在增量学习期间保留本地化信息。此外，我们还进一步评估所有地点的质量，并通过弹性响应选择（ERS）策略提供有价值的响应。最后，我们阐明在增量蒸馏过程中，来自不同响应的知识应该被赋予不同的重要性。在 MS COCO 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法取得了最先进的结果，这大大缩小了与全面训练的性能差距。 本文提出了一种基于弹性响应蒸馏（ERD）的方法，用于解决增量目标检测中的灾难性遗忘问题。 Tao Feng,Mang Wang,Hangjie Yuan cs.CV

title: Computing in Anonymous Dynamic Networks Is Linear
title_zh: 匿名动态网络中的计算是线性的
abstract: We give the first linear-time counting algorithm for processes in anonymous 1-interval-connected dynamic networks with a leader. As a byproduct, we are able to compute in $3n$ rounds every function that is deterministically computable in such networks. If explicit termination is not required, the running time improves to $2n$ rounds, which we show to be optimal up to a small additive constant (this is also the first non-trivial lower bound for counting). As our main tool of investigation, we introduce a combinatorial structure called "history tree", which is of independent interest. This makes our paper completely self-contained, our proofs elegant and transparent, and our algorithms straightforward to implement. In recent years, considerable effort has been devoted to the design and analysis of counting algorithms for anonymous 1-interval-connected networks with a leader. A series of increasingly sophisticated works, mostly based on classical mass-distribution techniques, have recently led to a celebrated counting algorithm in $O({n^{4+ ε}} \log^{3} (n))$ rounds (for $ε>0$), which was the state of the art prior to this paper. Our contribution not only opens a promising line of research on applications of history trees, but also demonstrates that computation in anonymous dynamic networks is practically feasible, and far less demanding than previously conjectured.
summary: We give the first linear-time counting algorithm for processes in anonymous 1-interval-connected dynamic networks with a leader. As a byproduct, we are able to compute in $3n$ rounds every function that is deterministically computable in such networks. If explicit termination is not required, the running time improves to $2n$ rounds, which we show to be optimal up to a small additive constant (this is also the first non-trivial lower bound for counting). As our main tool of investigation, we introduce a combinatorial structure called "history tree", which is of independent interest. This makes our paper completely self-contained, our proofs elegant and transparent, and our algorithms straightforward to implement. In recent years, considerable effort has been devoted to the design and analysis of counting algorithms for anonymous 1-interval-connected networks with a leader. A series of increasingly sophisticated works, mostly based on classical mass-distribution techniques, have recently led to a celebrated counting algorithm in $O({n^{4+ ε}} \log^{3} (n))$ rounds (for $ε>0$), which was the state of the art prior to this paper. Our contribution not only opens a promising line of research on applications of history trees, but also demonstrates that computation in anonymous dynamic networks is practically feasible, and far less demanding than previously conjectured.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了第一个用于具有领导者的匿名 1 间隔连接动态网络中进程的线性时间计数算法。作为副产品，我们能够在 $3n$ 轮内计算出此类网络中可确定计算的每个函数。如果不需要显式终止，则运行时间会提高到 $2n$ 轮，我们证明在一个小的加性常数范围内是最佳的（这也是计数的第一个重要下限）。作为我们的主要调查工具，我们引入了一种称为“历史树”的组合结构，它具有独立的兴趣。这使得我们的论文完全独立，我们的证明优雅且透明，并且我们的算法易于实现。近年来，人们在带领导者的匿名 1 区间连接网络的计数算法的设计和分析方面投入了大量的精力。一系列日益复杂的工作，主要基于经典的质量分布技术，最近产生了一种著名的 $O({n^{4+ ε}} \log^{3} (n))$ 轮计数算法（对于 $ε>0$），这是本文之前的最先进技术。我们的贡献不仅为历史树的应用开辟了一条有前途的研究路线，而且还证明了匿名动态网络中的计算实际上是可行的，并且远没有之前想象的那么苛刻。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在匿名1-区间连通动态网络中线性时间计数的算法，并展示了此类网络中可确定计算的函数可在3n轮内完成。
AI.motivation: 匿名动态网络中的计算效率长期受限于高复杂度算法，此前最优计数算法需O(n⁴+ε log³n)轮，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入名为'历史树'的组合结构作为核心工具，通过该结构设计简洁的计数算法并证明时间复杂度下界。
AI.result: 实现3n轮计数（含终止）或2n轮（不含终止），证明2n为最优时间复杂度，且历史树具有独立研究价值。
AI.conclusion: 计算在匿名动态网络中实际可行且需求远低于此前猜想，历史树为后续研究开辟新方向。

title: MetaAudio: A Few-Shot Audio Classification Benchmark
title_zh: MetaAudio：少量音频分类基准
comment: 9 pages with 1 figure and 2 main results tables. V1 Preprint
comments: 9 pages with 1 figure and 2 main results tables. V1 Preprint
abstract: Currently available benchmarks for few-shot learning (machine learning with few training examples) are limited in the domains they cover, primarily focusing on image classification. This work aims to alleviate this reliance on image-based benchmarks by offering the first comprehensive, public and fully reproducible audio based alternative, covering a variety of sound domains and experimental settings. We compare the few-shot classification performance of a variety of techniques on seven audio datasets (spanning environmental sounds to human-speech). Extending this, we carry out in-depth analyses of joint training (where all datasets are used during training) and cross-dataset adaptation protocols, establishing the possibility of a generalised audio few-shot classification algorithm. Our experimentation shows gradient-based meta-learning methods such as MAML and Meta-Curvature consistently outperform both metric and baseline methods. We also demonstrate that the joint training routine helps overall generalisation for the environmental sound databases included, as well as being a somewhat-effective method of tackling the cross-dataset/domain setting.
summary: Currently available benchmarks for few-shot learning (machine learning with few training examples) are limited in the domains they cover, primarily focusing on image classification. This work aims to alleviate this reliance on image-based benchmarks by offering the first comprehensive, public and fully reproducible audio based alternative, covering a variety of sound domains and experimental settings. We compare the few-shot classification performance of a variety of techniques on seven audio datasets (spanning environmental sounds to human-speech). Extending this, we carry out in-depth analyses of joint training (where all datasets are used during training) and cross-dataset adaptation protocols, establishing the possibility of a generalised audio few-shot classification algorithm. Our experimentation shows gradient-based meta-learning methods such as MAML and Meta-Curvature consistently outperform both metric and baseline methods. We also demonstrate that the joint training routine helps overall generalisation for the environmental sound databases included, as well as being a somewhat-effective method of tackling the cross-dataset/domain setting.
abstract_zh: 目前可用的少样本学习（训练示例很少的机器学习）基准在其覆盖的领域受到限制，主要集中在图像分类上。这项工作旨在通过提供第一个全面、公开且完全可复制的基于音频的替代方案（涵盖各种声音领域和实验设置）来减轻对基于图像的基准的依赖。我们比较了七个音频数据集（从环境声音到人类语音）上各种技术的少样本分类性能。扩展这一点，我们对联合训练（训练期间使用所有数据集）和跨数据集适应协议进行了深入分析，建立了通用音频少样本分类算法的可能性。我们的实验表明，基于梯度的元学习方法（例如 MAML 和 Meta-Curvature）始终优于度量方法和基线方法。我们还证明，联合训练例程有助于对所包含的环境声音数据库进行整体概括，并且是处理跨数据集/域设置的一种有效方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaAudio，一个涵盖多种声音领域的音频分类基准测试，用于评估少样本学习方法在音频任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本学习基准主要依赖图像分类，缺乏音频领域的全面评估，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 在七个音频数据集上比较多种少样本分类技术，分析联合训练和跨数据集适应策略，并采用梯度基元学习方法（如MAML）进行实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，梯度基元学习方法在音频分类中表现优于度量法和基线方法，联合训练能提升环境声音数据集的泛化能力，并部分解决跨数据集适应问题。
AI.conclusion: MetaAudio为音频少样本分类提供了首个全面且可复现的基准，验证了元学习方法的有效性，并证明联合训练对跨领域适应具有潜在价值。

Extending this, we carry out in-depth analyses of joint training (where all datasets are used during training) and cross-dataset adaptation protocols, establishing the possibility of a generalised audio few-shot classification algorithm. Our experimentation shows gradient-based meta-learning methods such as MAML and Meta-Curvature consistently outperform both metric and baseline methods. We also demonstrate that the joint training routine helps overall generalisation for the environmental sound databases included, as well as being a somewhat-effective method of tackling the cross-dataset/domain setting. 目前可用的少样本学习（训练示例很少的机器学习）基准在其覆盖的领域受到限制，主要集中在图像分类上。这项工作旨在通过提供第一个全面、公开且完全可复制的基于音频的替代方案（涵盖各种声音领域和实验设置）来减轻对基于图像的基准的依赖。我们比较了七个音频数据集（从环境声音到人类语音）上各种技术的少样本分类性能。扩展这一点，我们对联合训练（训练期间使用所有数据集）和跨数据集适应协议进行了深入分析，建立了通用音频少样本分类算法的可能性。我们的实验表明，基于梯度的元学习方法（例如 MAML 和 Meta-Curvature）始终优于度量方法和基线方法。我们还证明，联合训练例程有助于对所包含的环境声音数据库进行整体概括，并且是处理跨数据集/域设置的一种有效方法。 本文提出MetaAudio，一个涵盖多种声音领域的音频分类基准测试，用于评估少样本学习方法在音频任务中的性能。 Calum Heggan,Sam Budgett,Timothy Hospedales,Mehrdad Yaghoobi cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Kristoffer Fogh Andersen,Huy Xuan Pham,Halil Ibrahim Ugurlu,Erdal Kayacan
title: Event-based Navigation for Autonomous Drone Racing with Sparse Gated Recurrent Network
title_zh: 具有稀疏门控循环网络的自主无人机竞赛的基于事件的导航
comment: Accepted to present at the 20th European Control Conference (ECC)
comments: Accepted to present at the 20th European Control Conference (ECC)
abstract: Event-based vision has already revolutionized the perception task for robots by promising faster response, lower energy consumption, and lower bandwidth without introducing motion blur. In this work, a novel deep learning method based on gated recurrent units utilizing sparse convolutions for detecting gates in a race track is proposed using event-based vision for the autonomous drone racing problem. We demonstrate the efficiency and efficacy of the perception pipeline on a real robot platform that can safely navigate a typical autonomous drone racing track in real-time. Throughout the experiments, we show that the event-based vision with the proposed gated recurrent unit and pretrained models on simulated event data significantly improve the gate detection precision. Furthermore, an event-based drone racing dataset consisting of both simulated and real data sequences is publicly released.
summary: Event-based vision has already revolutionized the perception task for robots by promising faster response, lower energy consumption, and lower bandwidth without introducing motion blur. In this work, a novel deep learning method based on gated recurrent units utilizing sparse convolutions for detecting gates in a race track is proposed using event-based vision for the autonomous drone racing problem. We demonstrate the efficiency and efficacy of the perception pipeline on a real robot platform that can safely navigate a typical autonomous drone racing track in real-time. Throughout the experiments, we show that the event-based vision with the proposed gated recurrent unit and pretrained models on simulated event data significantly improve the gate detection precision. Furthermore, an event-based drone racing dataset consisting of both simulated and real data sequences is publicly released.
abstract_zh: 基于事件的视觉已经彻底改变了机器人的感知任务，承诺更快的响应、更低的能耗和更低的带宽，而不会引入运动模糊。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于门控循环单元的新型深度学习方法，利用稀疏卷积来检测赛道中的门，使用基于事件的视觉来解决自主无人机赛车问题。我们在真实的机器人平台上展示了​​感知管道的效率和功效，该平台可以安全地实时导航典型的自主无人机赛道。在整个实验中，我们表明，基于事件的视觉与所提出的门控循环单元和模拟事件数据上的预训练模型显着提高了门检测精度。此外，公开发布了由模拟和真实数据序列组成的基于事件的无人机竞赛数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件驱动视觉和稀疏门控循环网络的自主无人机竞速导航方法，用于实时检测赛道中的门框。
AI.motivation: 事件驱动视觉具有响应快、能耗低、带宽小的优势，但现有方法在动态场景下的门框检测精度不足，需结合深度学习提升实时性与准确性。
AI.method: 设计稀疏卷积与门控循环单元（GRU）结合的深度网络，利用事件相机数据训练模型，并在仿真与真实数据集上验证，发布包含仿真与真实数据的事件驱动无人机竞速数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实无人机平台实现典型赛道的实时安全导航，门框检测精度显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 事件驱动视觉结合稀疏GRU网络可有效提升自主无人机竞速的感知性能，公开数据集为后续研究提供支持。

authors_text: Bo Yuan,Danpei Zhao,Shuai Shao,Zehuan Yuan,Changhu Wang
title: Birds of A Feather Flock Together: Category-Divergence Guidance for Domain Adaptive Segmentation
title_zh: 物以类聚：领域自适应分割的类别分歧指南
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to enhance the generalization capability of a certain model from a source domain to a target domain. Present UDA models focus on alleviating the domain shift by minimizing the feature discrepancy between the source domain and the target domain but usually ignore the class confusion problem. In this work, we propose an Inter-class Separation and Intra-class Aggregation (ISIA) mechanism. It encourages the cross-domain representative consistency between the same categories and differentiation among diverse categories. In this way, the features belonging to the same categories are aligned together and the confusable categories are separated. By measuring the align complexity of each category, we design an Adaptive-weighted Instance Matching (AIM) strategy to further optimize the instance-level adaptation. Based on our proposed methods, we also raise a hierarchical unsupervised domain adaptation framework for cross-domain semantic segmentation task. Through performing the image-level, feature-level, category-level and instance-level alignment, our method achieves a stronger generalization performance of the model from the source domain to the target domain. In two typical cross-domain semantic segmentation tasks, i.e., GTA5 to Cityscapes and SYNTHIA to Cityscapes, our method achieves the state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy. We also build two cross-domain semantic segmentation datasets based on the publicly available data, i.e., remote sensing building segmentation and road segmentation, for domain adaptive segmentation.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to enhance the generalization capability of a certain model from a source domain to a target domain. Present UDA models focus on alleviating the domain shift by minimizing the feature discrepancy between the source domain and the target domain but usually ignore the class confusion problem. In this work, we propose an Inter-class Separation and Intra-class Aggregation (ISIA) mechanism. It encourages the cross-domain representative consistency between the same categories and differentiation among diverse categories. In this way, the features belonging to the same categories are aligned together and the confusable categories are separated. By measuring the align complexity of each category, we design an Adaptive-weighted Instance Matching (AIM) strategy to further optimize the instance-level adaptation. Based on our proposed methods, we also raise a hierarchical unsupervised domain adaptation framework for cross-domain semantic segmentation task. Through performing the image-level, feature-level, category-level and instance-level alignment, our method achieves a stronger generalization performance of the model from the source domain to the target domain. In two typical cross-domain semantic segmentation tasks, i.e., GTA5 to Cityscapes and SYNTHIA to Cityscapes, our method achieves the state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy. We also build two cross-domain semantic segmentation datasets based on the publicly available data, i.e., remote sensing building segmentation and road segmentation, for domain adaptive segmentation.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在增强某种模型从源域到目标域的泛化能力。目前的 UDA 模型侧重于通过最小化源域和目标域之间的特征差异来减轻域转移，但通常忽略类混淆问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种类间分离和类内聚合（ISIA）机制。它鼓励相同类别之间的跨领域代表性一致性和不同类别之间的差异化。这样，属于同一类别的特征就被对齐在一起，而易混淆的类别就被分开了。通过测量每个类别的对齐复杂度，我们设计了自适应加权实例匹配（AIM）策略，以进一步优化实例级自适应。基于我们提出的方法，我们还提出了一个用于跨域语义分割任务的分层无监督域适应框架。通过执行图像级、特征级、类别级和实例级对齐，我们的方法实现了模型从源域到目标域的更强的泛化性能。在两个典型的跨域语义分割任务中，即 GTA5 到 Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA 到 Cityscapes，我们的方法实现了最先进的分割精度。我们还基于公开数据构建了两个跨域语义分割数据集，即遥感建筑分割和道路分割，用于域自适应分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类别分歧指导的领域自适应分割方法，解决跨域语义分割中类别混淆问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应方法仅关注特征差异，忽视类别混淆问题，导致同类特征未对齐、异类特征易混淆，影响分割性能。
AI.method: 设计Inter-class Separation and Intra-class Aggregation（ISIA）机制，通过跨域同类对齐与异类分离，结合Adaptive-weighted Instance Matching（AIM）策略优化实例级适应，并构建分层UDA框架实现多级对齐。
AI.result: 在GTA5→Cityscapes和SYNTHIA→Cityscapes任务中达到SOTA分割精度，同时构建了遥感建筑与道路分割的跨域数据集。
AI.conclusion: 通过类别分歧指导的ISIA机制与分层框架，有效解决领域自适应分割中的类别混淆问题，显著提升模型泛化能力并推动相关数据集建设。

title: Non-Linear Speech coding with MLP, RBF and Elman based prediction
title_zh: 基于 MLP、RBF 和 Elman 预测的非线性语音编码
comment: 9 pages, published in Mira, J., Álvarez, J.R. (eds) Artificial Neural Nets Problem Solving Methods. IWANN 2003. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 2687. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
comments: 9 pages, published in Mira, J., Álvarez, J.R. (eds) Artificial Neural Nets Problem Solving Methods. IWANN 2003. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 2687. Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
abstract: In this paper we propose a nonlinear scalar predictor based on a combination of Multi Layer Perceptron, Radial Basis Functions and Elman networks. This system is applied to speech coding in an ADPCM backward scheme. The combination of this predictors improves the results of one predictor alone. A comparative study of this three neural networks for speech prediction is also presented.
summary: In this paper we propose a nonlinear scalar predictor based on a combination of Multi Layer Perceptron, Radial Basis Functions and Elman networks. This system is applied to speech coding in an ADPCM backward scheme. The combination of this predictors improves the results of one predictor alone. A comparative study of this three neural networks for speech prediction is also presented.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多层感知器、径向基函数和 Elman 网络组合的非线性标量预测器。该系统应用于ADPCM后向方案中的语音编码。这些预测变量的组合可以改善单独一个预测变量的结果。还提出了这三种用于语音预测的神经网络的比较研究。

search_text: Non-Linear Speech coding with MLP, RBF and Elman based prediction 基于 MLP、RBF 和 Elman 预测的非线性语音编码 In this paper we propose a nonlinear scalar predictor based on a combination of Multi Layer Perceptron, Radial Basis Functions and Elman networks. This system is applied to speech coding in an ADPCM backward scheme. The combination of this predictors improves the results of one predictor alone. A comparative study of this three neural networks for speech prediction is also presented. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多层感知器、径向基函数和 Elman 网络组合的非线性标量预测器。该系统应用于ADPCM后向方案中的语音编码。这些预测变量的组合可以改善单独一个预测变量的结果。还提出了这三种用于语音预测的神经网络的比较研究。 提出一种结合MLP、RBF和Elman网络的非线性预测器，用于改进ADPCM语音编码的预测效果 Marcos Faundez-Zanuy cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Collective control of modular soft robots via embodied Spiking Neural Cellular Automata
title_zh: 通过体现尖峰神经细胞自动机的模块化软机器人的集体控制
comment: Workshop on "From Cells to Societies: Collective Learning across Scales" at the International Conference on Learning Representations (Cells2Societies@ICLR)
comments: Workshop on "From Cells to Societies: Collective Learning across Scales" at the International Conference on Learning Representations (Cells2Societies@ICLR)
abstract: Voxel-based Soft Robots (VSRs) are a form of modular soft robots, composed of several deformable cubes, i.e., voxels. Each VSR is thus an ensemble of simple agents, namely the voxels, which must cooperate to give rise to the overall VSR behavior. Within this paradigm, collective intelligence plays a key role in enabling the emerge of coordination, as each voxel is independently controlled, exploiting only the local sensory information together with some knowledge passed from its direct neighbors (distributed or collective control). In this work, we propose a novel form of collective control, influenced by Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) and based on the bio-inspired Spiking Neural Networks: the embodied Spiking NCA (SNCA). We experiment with different variants of SNCA, and find them to be competitive with the state-of-the-art distributed controllers for the task of locomotion. In addition, our findings show significant improvement with respect to the baseline in terms of adaptability to unforeseen environmental changes, which could be a determining factor for physical practicability of VSRs.
summary: Voxel-based Soft Robots (VSRs) are a form of modular soft robots, composed of several deformable cubes, i.e., voxels. Each VSR is thus an ensemble of simple agents, namely the voxels, which must cooperate to give rise to the overall VSR behavior. Within this paradigm, collective intelligence plays a key role in enabling the emerge of coordination, as each voxel is independently controlled, exploiting only the local sensory information together with some knowledge passed from its direct neighbors (distributed or collective control). In this work, we propose a novel form of collective control, influenced by Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) and based on the bio-inspired Spiking Neural Networks: the embodied Spiking NCA (SNCA). We experiment with different variants of SNCA, and find them to be competitive with the state-of-the-art distributed controllers for the task of locomotion. In addition, our findings show significant improvement with respect to the baseline in terms of adaptability to unforeseen environmental changes, which could be a determining factor for physical practicability of VSRs.
abstract_zh: 基于体素的软机器人（VSR）是模块化软机器人的一种形式，由多个可变形立方体（即体素）组成。因此，每个 VSR 都是简单代理（即体素）的集合，它们必须合作才能产生整体 VSR 行为。在这种范式中，集体智慧在协调的出现中发挥着关键作用，因为每个体素都是独立控制的，仅利用局部感觉信息以及从其直接邻居传递的一些知识（分布式或集体控制）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种受神经细胞自动机（NCA）影响并基于生物启发的尖峰神经网络的集体控制的新形式：体现的尖峰NCA（SNCA）。我们对 SNCA 的不同变体进行了实验，发现它们在运动任务方面与最先进的分布式控制器具有竞争力。此外，我们的研究结果表明，在对不可预见的环境变化的适应性方面，相对于基线有显着改善，这可能是 VSR 物理实用性的决定因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物启发式脉冲神经网络的新型集体控制方法，用于模块化软机器人的协调控制。
AI.motivation: 模块化软机器人（VSR）需要通过分布式控制实现协调运动，但现有方法在环境适应性方面存在不足，需探索更高效的集体智能控制方案。
AI.method: 设计融合神经细胞自动机（NCA）与脉冲神经网络的具身脉冲NCA（SNCA），通过局部感知与邻居交互实现分布式控制，并测试多种变体。
AI.result: SNCA在运动任务中表现与最先进分布式控制器相当，且在环境适应性方面显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 具身脉冲NCA为模块化软机器人提供了可扩展的集体控制框架，其环境适应性提升有助于实际应用。

Each VSR is thus an ensemble of simple agents, namely the voxels, which must cooperate to give rise to the overall VSR behavior. title: Simulated Annealing is a Polynomial-Time Approximation Scheme for the Minimum Spanning Tree Problem
title_zh: 模拟退火是最小生成树问题的多项式时间逼近方案
comment: 19 pages. Extended version of a paper at GECCO 2022. This version is accepted for publication in Algorithmica
comments: 19 pages. Extended version of a paper at GECCO 2022. This version is accepted for publication in Algorithmica
abstract: We prove that Simulated Annealing with an appropriate cooling schedule computes arbitrarily tight constant-factor approximations to the minimum spanning tree problem in polynomial time. This result was conjectured by Wegener (2005). More precisely, denoting by $n, m, w_{\max}$, and $w_{\min}$ the number of vertices and edges as well as the maximum and minimum edge weight of the MST instance, we prove that simulated annealing with initial temperature $T_0 \ge w_{\max}$ and multiplicative cooling schedule with factor $1-1/\ell$, where $\ell = ω(mn\ln(m))$, with probability at least $1-1/m$ computes in time $O(\ell (\ln\ln (\ell) + \ln(T_0/w_{\min}) ))$ a spanning tree with weight at most $1+κ$ times the optimum weight, where $1+κ= \frac{(1+o(1))\ln(\ell m)}{\ln(\ell) -\ln (mn\ln (m))}$. Consequently, for any $ε>0$, we can choose $\ell$ in such a way that a $(1+ε)$-approximation is found in time $O((mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$ with probability at least $1-1/m$. In the special case of so-called $(1+ε)$-separated weights, this algorithm computes an optimal solution (again in time $O( (mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$), which is a significant speed-up over Wegener's runtime guarantee of $O(m^{8 + 8/ε})$.
summary: We prove that Simulated Annealing with an appropriate cooling schedule computes arbitrarily tight constant-factor approximations to the minimum spanning tree problem in polynomial time. This result was conjectured by Wegener (2005). More precisely, denoting by $n, m, w_{\max}$, and $w_{\min}$ the number of vertices and edges as well as the maximum and minimum edge weight of the MST instance, we prove that simulated annealing with initial temperature $T_0 \ge w_{\max}$ and multiplicative cooling schedule with factor $1-1/\ell$, where $\ell = ω(mn\ln(m))$, with probability at least $1-1/m$ computes in time $O(\ell (\ln\ln (\ell) + \ln(T_0/w_{\min}) ))$ a spanning tree with weight at most $1+κ$ times the optimum weight, where $1+κ= \frac{(1+o(1))\ln(\ell m)}{\ln(\ell) -\ln (mn\ln (m))}$. Consequently, for any $ε>0$, we can choose $\ell$ in such a way that a $(1+ε)$-approximation is found in time $O((mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$ with probability at least $1-1/m$. In the special case of so-called $(1+ε)$-separated weights, this algorithm computes an optimal solution (again in time $O( (mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$), which is a significant speed-up over Wegener's runtime guarantee of $O(m^{8 + 8/ε})$.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，具有适当冷却计划的模拟退火可以在多项式时间内计算最小生成树问题的任意紧常数因子近似值。这个结果是Wegener (2005)推测的。更准确地说，用 $n、m、w_{\max}$ 和 $w_{\min}$ 表示 MST 实例的顶点和边的数量以及最大和最小边权重，我们证明了初始温度 $T_0 \ge w_{\max}$ 的模拟退火和因子 $1-1/\ell$ 的乘法冷却计划，其中 $\ell = ω(mn\ln(m))$，概率至少$1-1/m$ 及时计算 $O(\ell (\ln\ln (\ell) + \ln(T_0/w_{\min}) ))$ 权重至多 $1+κ$ 乘以最佳权重的生成树，其中 $1+κ= \frac{(1+o(1))\ln(\ell m)}{\ln(\ell) -\ln (mn\ln (m))}$。因此，对于任何 $ε>0$，我们可以选择 $\ell$，使得在时间 $O((mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$ 中找到 $(1+ε)$ 近似值，概率至少为 $1-1/m$。在所谓的 $(1+ε)$ 分离权重的特殊情况下，该算法计算最优解（再次在时间 $O( (mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$ 中），这比 Wegener 的 $O(m^{8 + 8/ε})$ 运行时保证有显着的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文证明模拟退火算法在适当冷却计划下可在多项式时间内计算最小生成树问题的任意紧致常数因子近似解。
AI.motivation: 旨在验证Wegener（2005）关于模拟退火算法可作为最小生成树问题多项式时间近似方案的猜想，并改进现有运行时间保证。
AI.method: 采用初始温度T₀≥最大边权且乘法冷却因子为1-1/ℓ的冷却计划，结合ℓ=ω(mn ln m)的参数设置，分析算法时间复杂度与近似比。
AI.result: 证明算法以至少1-1/m的概率在O(ℓ(ln ln ℓ + ln(T₀/w_min)))时间内输出权重不超过最优解(1+κ)倍的生成树，且对(1+ε)-分离权重实例可达到最优解，时间复杂度优于Wegener的O(m^{8+8/ε})。
AI.conclusion: 确认了模拟退火算法作为最小生成树问题PTAS的猜想，尤其在权重分离情况下显著提升了运行效率，拓展了该算法在组合优化中的应用边界。

result: 证明算法以至少1-1/m的概率在O(ℓ(ln ln ℓ + ln(T₀/w_min)))时间内输出权重不超过最优解(1+κ)倍的生成树，且对(1+ε)-分离权重实例可达到最优解，时间复杂度优于Wegener的O(m^{8+8/ε})。
conclusion: 确认了模拟退火算法作为最小生成树问题PTAS的猜想，尤其在权重分离情况下显著提升了运行效率，拓展了该算法在组合优化中的应用边界。
search_text: Simulated Annealing is a Polynomial-Time Approximation Scheme for the Minimum Spanning Tree Problem 模拟退火是最小生成树问题的多项式时间逼近方案 We prove that Simulated Annealing with an appropriate cooling schedule computes arbitrarily tight constant-factor approximations to the minimum spanning tree problem in polynomial time. This result was conjectured by Wegener (2005). More precisely, denoting by $n, m, w_{\max}$, and $w_{\min}$ the number of vertices and edges as well as the maximum and minimum edge weight of the MST instance, we prove that simulated annealing with initial temperature $T_0 \ge w_{\max}$ and multiplicative cooling schedule with factor $1-1/\ell$, where $\ell = ω(mn\ln(m))$, with probability at least $1-1/m$ computes in time $O(\ell (\ln\ln (\ell) + \ln(T_0/w_{\min}) ))$ a spanning tree with weight at most $1+κ$ times the optimum weight, where $1+κ= \frac{(1+o(1))\ln(\ell m)}{\ln(\ell) -\ln (mn\ln (m))}$. Consequently, for any $ε>0$, we can choose $\ell$ in such a way that a $(1+ε)$-approximation is found in time $O((mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$ with probability at least $1-1/m$. In the special case of so-called $(1+ε)$-separated weights, this algorithm computes an optimal solution (again in time $O( (mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$), which is a significant speed-up over Wegener's runtime guarantee of $O(m^{8 + 8/ε})$. 我们证明，具有适当冷却计划的模拟退火可以在多项式时间内计算最小生成树问题的任意紧常数因子近似值。这个结果是Wegener (2005)推测的。更准确地说，用 $n、m、w_{\max}$ 和 $w_{\min}$ 表示 MST 实例的顶点和边的数量以及最大和最小边权重，我们证明了初始温度 $T_0 \ge w_{\max}$ 的模拟退火和因子 $1-1/\ell$ 的乘法冷却计划，其中 $\ell = ω(mn\ln(m))$，概率至少$1-1/m$ 及时计算 $O(\ell (\ln\ln (\ell) + \ln(T_0/w_{\min}) ))$ 权重至多 $1+κ$ 乘以最佳权重的生成树，其中 $1+κ= \frac{(1+o(1))\ln(\ell m)}{\ln(\ell) -\ln (mn\ln (m))}$。因此，对于任何 $ε>0$，我们可以选择 $\ell$，使得在时间 $O((mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$ 中找到 $(1+ε)$ 近似值，概率至少为 $1-1/m$。在所谓的 $(1+ε)$ 分离权重的特殊情况下，该算法计算最优解（再次在时间 $O( (mn\ln(n))^{1+1/ε+o(1)}(\ln\ln n + \ln(T_0/w_{\min})))$ 中），这比 Wegener 的 $O(m^{8 + 8/ε})$ 运行时保证有显着的加速。 本文证明模拟退火算法在适当冷却计划下可在多项式时间内计算最小生成树问题的任意紧致常数因子近似解。 Benjamin Doerr,Amirhossein Rajabi,Carsten Witt cs.NE,cs.DS

authors_text: Artur Czumaj,Arnold Filtser,Shaofeng H. -C. Jiang,Robert Krauthgamer,Pavel Veselý,Mingwei Yang
title: Streaming Facility Location in High Dimension via Geometric Hashing
title_zh: 通过几何哈希确定高维流媒体设施位置
comment: The abstract is shortened to meet the length constraint of arXiv
comments: The abstract is shortened to meet the length constraint of arXiv
abstract: In Euclidean Uniform Facility Location (UFL), the input is a set of clients in $\mathbb{R}^d$ and the goal is to place facilities to serve them, so as to minimize the total cost of opening facilities plus connecting the clients. We study the setting of dynamic geometric streams, where the clients are presented as a sequence of insertions and deletions of points in the grid $\{1,\ldots,Δ\}^d$, and we focus on the \emph{high-dimensional regime}, where the algorithm must use space polynomial in $d\cdot\logΔ$. We present a new algorithmic framework, based on importance sampling, for $O(1)$-approximation of UFL using only $\mathrm{poly}(d\cdot\logΔ)$ space. This framework is easy to implement in two passes, one for sampling points and the other for estimating their contribution. Over random-order streams, we can extend this to one pass by using the two halves of the stream separately. Our main result, for arbitrary-order streams, computes $O(d / \log d)$-approximation in one pass by combining the two passes differently. This improves upon previous algorithms that either need space $\exp(d)$ or only guarantee $O(d\cdot\log^2Δ)$-approximation, and therefore our algorithms for high dimension are the first to avoid the $O(\logΔ)$-factor in approximation that is inherent to the widely-used quadtree decomposition. Our improvement is achieved by employing a geometric hashing scheme that maps points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ into buckets of bounded diameter, with the key property that every point set of small-enough diameter is hashed into few buckets. By applying an alternative bound for this hashing, we also obtain an $O(1 / ε)$-approximation in one pass, using larger but still sublinear space $O(n^ε)$ where $n$ is the number of clients. We complement our results by showing $1.085$-approximation requires space exponential in $\mathrm{poly}(d\cdot\logΔ)$.

We study the setting of dynamic geometric streams, where the clients are presented as a sequence of insertions and deletions of points in the grid $\{1,\ldots,Δ\}^d$, and we focus on the \emph{high-dimensional regime}, where the algorithm must use space polynomial in $d\cdot\logΔ$. We present a new algorithmic framework, based on importance sampling, for $O(1)$-approximation of UFL using only $\mathrm{poly}(d\cdot\logΔ)$ space. This framework is easy to implement in two passes, one for sampling points and the other for estimating their contribution. Over random-order streams, we can extend this to one pass by using the two halves of the stream separately. Our main result, for arbitrary-order streams, computes $O(d / \log d)$-approximation in one pass by combining the two passes differently. This improves upon previous algorithms that either need space $\exp(d)$ or only guarantee $O(d\cdot\log^2Δ)$-approximation, and therefore our algorithms for high dimension are the first to avoid the $O(\logΔ)$-factor in approximation that is inherent to the widely-used quadtree decomposition. Our improvement is achieved by employing a geometric hashing scheme that maps points in $\mathbb{R}^d$ into buckets of bounded diameter, with the key property that every point set of small-enough diameter is hashed into few buckets. By applying an alternative bound for this hashing, we also obtain an $O(1 / ε)$-approximation in one pass, using larger but still sublinear space $O(n^ε)$ where $n$ is the number of clients. We complement our results by showing $1.085$-approximation requires space exponential in $\mathrm{poly}(d\cdot\logΔ)$.
abstract_zh: 在欧几里得统一设施位置（UFL）中，输入是 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的一组客户端，目标是放置设施为它们服务，从而最小化开放设施加上连接客户端的总成本。我们研究动态几何流的设置，其中客户端呈现为网格 $\{1,\ldots,Δ\}^d$ 中点的插入和删除序列，并且我们关注 \emph{高维体系}，其中算法必须使用 $d\cdot\logΔ$ 中的空间多项式。我们提出了一种基于重要性采样的新算法框架，仅使用 $\mathrm{poly}(d\cdot\logΔ)$ 空间来实现 UFL 的 $O(1)$ 近似。该框架很容易通过两遍来实现，一次用于采样点，另一次用于估计它们的贡献。对于随机顺序流，我们可以通过分别使用流的两半来将其扩展到一次传递。对于任意顺序流，我们的主要结果是通过以不同方式组合两遍，在一次遍中计算 $O(d / \log d)$ 近似值。这改进了以前需要空间 $\exp(d)$ 或仅保证 $O(d\cdot\log^2Δ)$ 近似的算法，因此我们的高维算法是第一个避免广泛使用的四叉树分解固有的 $O(\logΔ)$ 近似因子的算法。我们的改进是通过采用几何哈希方案来实现的，该方案将 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中的点映射到有界直径的桶中，其关键属性是每个足够小直径的点集都被哈希到几个桶中。通过为此散列应用替代界限，我们还可以使用更大但仍然是次线性空间 $O(n^ε)$ 一次性获得 $O(1 / ε)$ 近似值，其中 $n$ 是客户端数量。我们通过显示 $1.085$ 近似需要 $\mathrm{poly}(d\cdot\logΔ)$ 中的空间指数来补充我们的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究高维空间中动态几何流的设施定位问题，提出基于几何哈希的新算法框架，以多项式空间实现近似最优解。
AI.motivation: 传统算法在高维场景下需指数级空间或存在O(logΔ)近似因子限制，无法高效处理大规模动态数据流。
AI.method: 设计几何哈希方案将高维点映射至有限桶中，结合重要性抽样与双通道流处理，通过分阶段采样与贡献估计实现近似优化。
AI.result: 在任意顺序流中实现O(d/log d)近似比，单次遍历下空间复杂度为poly(d logΔ)，并证明1.085近似需指数级空间。
AI.conclusion: 首次突破高维流设施定位的O(logΔ)近似瓶颈，几何哈希方案有效平衡了空间效率与近似精度。

authors_text: Vaishakh Patil,Christos Sakaridis,Alexander Liniger,Luc Van Gool
title: P3Depth: Monocular Depth Estimation with a Piecewise Planarity Prior
title_zh: P3Depth：使用分段平面先验的单眼深度估计
abstract: Monocular depth estimation is vital for scene understanding and downstream tasks. We focus on the supervised setup, in which ground-truth depth is available only at training time. Based on knowledge about the high regularity of real 3D scenes, we propose a method that learns to selectively leverage information from coplanar pixels to improve the predicted depth. In particular, we introduce a piecewise planarity prior which states that for each pixel, there is a seed pixel which shares the same planar 3D surface with the former. Motivated by this prior, we design a network with two heads. The first head outputs pixel-level plane coefficients, while the second one outputs a dense offset vector field that identifies the positions of seed pixels. The plane coefficients of seed pixels are then used to predict depth at each position. The resulting prediction is adaptively fused with the initial prediction from the first head via a learned confidence to account for potential deviations from precise local planarity. The entire architecture is trained end-to-end thanks to the differentiability of the proposed modules and it learns to predict regular depth maps, with sharp edges at occlusion boundaries. An extensive evaluation of our method shows that we set the new state of the art in supervised monocular depth estimation, surpassing prior methods on NYU Depth-v2 and on the Garg split of KITTI. Our method delivers depth maps that yield plausible 3D reconstructions of the input scenes. Code is available at: https://github.com/SysCV/P3Depth
summary: Monocular depth estimation is vital for scene understanding and downstream tasks. We focus on the supervised setup, in which ground-truth depth is available only at training time. Based on knowledge about the high regularity of real 3D scenes, we propose a method that learns to selectively leverage information from coplanar pixels to improve the predicted depth. In particular, we introduce a piecewise planarity prior which states that for each pixel, there is a seed pixel which shares the same planar 3D surface with the former. Motivated by this prior, we design a network with two heads. The first head outputs pixel-level plane coefficients, while the second one outputs a dense offset vector field that identifies the positions of seed pixels. The plane coefficients of seed pixels are then used to predict depth at each position. The resulting prediction is adaptively fused with the initial prediction from the first head via a learned confidence to account for potential deviations from precise local planarity. The entire architecture is trained end-to-end thanks to the differentiability of the proposed modules and it learns to predict regular depth maps, with sharp edges at occlusion boundaries. An extensive evaluation of our method shows that we set the new state of the art in supervised monocular depth estimation, surpassing prior methods on NYU Depth-v2 and on the Garg split of KITTI. Our method delivers depth maps that yield plausible 3D reconstructions of the input scenes. Code is available at: https://github.com/SysCV/P3Depth
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计对于场景理解和下游任务至关重要。我们专注于监督设置，其中地面实况深度仅在训练时可用。基于对真实 3D 场景高度规律性的了解，我们提出了一种学习选择性利用共面像素信息来提高预测深度的方法。特别是，我们引入了分段平面性先验，它指出对于每个像素，都有一个种子像素与前者共享相同的平面 3D 表面。受此先验的启发，我们设计了一个具有两个头的网络。第一个头输出像素级平面系数，而第二个头输出识别种子像素位置的密集偏移矢量场。然后使用种子像素的平面系数来预测每个位置的深度。由此产生的预测通过学习的置信度与来自第一个头的初始预测自适应地融合，以解决与精确局部平面性的潜在偏差。由于所提出的模块的可微性，整个架构进行了端到端的训练，并且它学习预测规则的深度图，在遮挡边界处具有锐利的边缘。对我们方法的广泛评估表明，我们在监督单目深度估计方面设定了新的技术水平，超越了 NYU Depth-v2 和 KITTI Garg split 上的先前方法。我们的方法提供深度图，从而对输入场景进行合理的 3D 重建。代码位于：https://github.com/SysCV/P3Depth

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分段平面先验的单目深度估计方法P3Depth，通过利用共面像素信息提升深度预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现实3D场景具有高度规律性，共面像素间存在平面几何关系，但现有方法未能有效利用这一特性。
AI.method: 设计双头网络：第一头输出像素级平面系数，第二头生成种子像素偏移场。通过种子像素平面系数预测深度，并与初始预测结果加权融合。
AI.result: 在NYU Depth-v2和KITTI数据集上达到监督单目深度估计新SOTA，生成的深度图可重建合理3D场景。
AI.conclusion: 分段平面先验有效提升了深度估计精度，端到端训练框架成功捕捉了场景几何规律性。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于分段平面先验的单目深度估计方法P3Depth，通过利用共面像素信息提升深度预测精度。
motivation: 现实3D场景具有高度规律性，共面像素间存在平面几何关系，但现有方法未能有效利用这一特性。
method: 设计双头网络：第一头输出像素级平面系数，第二头生成种子像素偏移场。通过种子像素平面系数预测深度，并与初始预测结果加权融合。

conclusion: 分段平面先验有效提升了深度估计精度，端到端训练框架成功捕捉了场景几何规律性。
search_text: P3Depth: Monocular Depth Estimation with a Piecewise Planarity Prior P3Depth：使用分段平面先验的单眼深度估计 Monocular depth estimation is vital for scene understanding and downstream tasks. We focus on the supervised setup, in which ground-truth depth is available only at training time. Based on knowledge about the high regularity of real 3D scenes, we propose a method that learns to selectively leverage information from coplanar pixels to improve the predicted depth. In particular, we introduce a piecewise planarity prior which states that for each pixel, there is a seed pixel which shares the same planar 3D surface with the former. Motivated by this prior, we design a network with two heads. The first head outputs pixel-level plane coefficients, while the second one outputs a dense offset vector field that identifies the positions of seed pixels. The plane coefficients of seed pixels are then used to predict depth at each position. The resulting prediction is adaptively fused with the initial prediction from the first head via a learned confidence to account for potential deviations from precise local planarity. The entire architecture is trained end-to-end thanks to the differentiability of the proposed modules and it learns to predict regular depth maps, with sharp edges at occlusion boundaries. An extensive evaluation of our method shows that we set the new state of the art in supervised monocular depth estimation, surpassing prior methods on NYU Depth-v2 and on the Garg split of KITTI. Our method delivers depth maps that yield plausible 3D reconstructions of the input scenes. Code is available at: https://github.com/SysCV/P3Depth 单目深度估计对于场景理解和下游任务至关重要。我们专注于监督设置，其中地面实况深度仅在训练时可用。基于对真实 3D 场景高度规律性的了解，我们提出了一种学习选择性利用共面像素信息来提高预测深度的方法。特别是，我们引入了分段平面性先验，它指出对于每个像素，都有一个种子像素与前者共享相同的平面 3D 表面。受此先验的启发，我们设计了一个具有两个头的网络。第一个头输出像素级平面系数，而第二个头输出识别种子像素位置的密集偏移矢量场。然后使用种子像素的平面系数来预测每个位置的深度。由此产生的预测通过学习的置信度与来自第一个头的初始预测自适应地融合，以解决与精确局部平面性的潜在偏差。由于所提出的模块的可微性，整个架构进行了端到端的训练，并且它学习预测规则的深度图，在遮挡边界处具有锐利的边缘。对我们方法的广泛评估表明，我们在监督单目深度估计方面设定了新的技术水平，超越了 NYU Depth-v2 和 KITTI Garg split 上的先前方法。我们的方法提供深度图，从而对输入场景进行合理的 3D 重建。代码位于：https://github.com/SysCV/P3Depth 本文提出一种基于分段平面先验的单目深度估计方法P3Depth，通过利用共面像素信息提升深度预测精度。 Vaishakh Patil,Christos Sakaridis,Alexander Liniger,Luc Van Gool cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Venkatesh S. Kadandale,Juan F. Montesinos,Gloria Haro
title: VocaLiST: An Audio-Visual Synchronisation Model for Lips and Voices
title_zh: VocaLiST：嘴唇和声音的视听同步模型
comment: Paper accepted to Interspeech 2022; Project Page: https://ipcv.github.io/VocaLiST/
comments: Paper accepted to Interspeech 2022; Project Page: https://ipcv.github.io/VocaLiST/
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of lip-voice synchronisation in videos containing human face and voice. Our approach is based on determining if the lips motion and the voice in a video are synchronised or not, depending on their audio-visual correspondence score. We propose an audio-visual cross-modal transformer-based model that outperforms several baseline models in the audio-visual synchronisation task on the standard lip-reading speech benchmark dataset LRS2. While the existing methods focus mainly on lip synchronisation in speech videos, we also consider the special case of the singing voice. The singing voice is a more challenging use case for synchronisation due to sustained vowel sounds. We also investigate the relevance of lip synchronisation models trained on speech datasets in the context of singing voice. Finally, we use the frozen visual features learned by our lip synchronisation model in the singing voice separation task to outperform a baseline audio-visual model which was trained end-to-end. The demos, source code, and the pre-trained models are available on https://ipcv.github.io/VocaLiST/
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of lip-voice synchronisation in videos containing human face and voice. Our approach is based on determining if the lips motion and the voice in a video are synchronised or not, depending on their audio-visual correspondence score. We propose an audio-visual cross-modal transformer-based model that outperforms several baseline models in the audio-visual synchronisation task on the standard lip-reading speech benchmark dataset LRS2. While the existing methods focus mainly on lip synchronisation in speech videos, we also consider the special case of the singing voice. The singing voice is a more challenging use case for synchronisation due to sustained vowel sounds. We also investigate the relevance of lip synchronisation models trained on speech datasets in the context of singing voice. Finally, we use the frozen visual features learned by our lip synchronisation model in the singing voice separation task to outperform a baseline audio-visual model which was trained end-to-end. The demos, source code, and the pre-trained models are available on https://ipcv.github.io/VocaLiST/
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了包含人脸和语音的视频中的唇音同步问题。我们的方法基于确定视频中的嘴唇运动和声音是否同步，具体取决于它们的视听对应分数。我们提出了一种基于视听跨模态转换器的模型，该模型在标准唇读语音基准数据集 LRS2 上的视听同步任务中优于多个基线模型。虽然现有的方法主要关注语音视频中的唇形同步，但我们也考虑了歌声的特殊情况。由于元音持续存在，歌声对于同步来说是一个更具挑战性的用例。我们还研究了在歌声背景下在语音数据集上训练的唇同步模型的相关性。最后，我们在歌声分离任务中使用唇同步模型学到的冻结视觉特征，以超越端到端训练的基线视听模型。演示、源代码和预训练模型可在 https://ipcv.github.io/VocaLiST/ 上获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种音频-视觉同步模型VocaLiST，用于在包含人脸和声音的视频中实现嘴唇运动与声音的同步。
AI.motivation: 现有的方法主要关注语音视频中的嘴唇同步，而对歌唱声音这一更具挑战性的案例研究较少，因此本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于音频-视觉跨模态Transformer的模型，用于评估视频中嘴唇运动与声音的同步性，并在LRS2数据集上进行了验证。
AI.result: 该模型在标准唇读语音基准数据集LRS2上优于多个基线模型，并在歌唱声音分离任务中表现优于端到端训练的基线音频-视觉模型。
AI.conclusion: VocaLiST模型在音频-视觉同步任务中表现出色，特别是在歌唱声音的处理上具有潜力，且其冻结的视觉特征可用于其他相关任务。

title: A Mixed supervised Learning Framework for Target Sound Detection
title_zh: 目标声音检测的混合监督学习框架
abstract: Target sound detection (TSD) aims to detect the target sound from mixture audio given the reference information. Previous works have shown that TSD models can be trained on fully-annotated (frame-level label) or weakly-annotated (clip-level label) data. However, there are some clear evidences show that the performance of the model trained on weakly-annotated data is worse than that trained on fully-annotated data. To fill this gap, we provide a mixed supervision perspective, in which learning novel categories (target domain) using weak annotations with the help of full annotations of existing base categories (source domain). To realize this, a mixed supervised learning framework is proposed, which contains two mutually-helping student models (\textit{f\_student} and \textit{w\_student}) that learn from fully-annotated and weakly-annotated data, respectively. The motivation is that \textit{f\_student} learned from fully-annotated data has a better ability to capture detailed information than \textit{w\_student}. Thus, we first let \textit{f\_student} guide \textit{w\_student} to learn the ability to capture details, so \textit{w\_student} can perform better in the target domain. Then we let \textit{w\_student} guide \textit{f\_student} to fine-tune on the target domain. The process can be repeated several times so that the two students perform very well in the target domain. To evaluate our method, we built three TSD datasets based on UrbanSound and Audioset. Experimental results show that our methods offer about 8\% improvement in event-based F-score as compared with a recent baseline.
summary: Target sound detection (TSD) aims to detect the target sound from mixture audio given the reference information. Previous works have shown that TSD models can be trained on fully-annotated (frame-level label) or weakly-annotated (clip-level label) data. However, there are some clear evidences show that the performance of the model trained on weakly-annotated data is worse than that trained on fully-annotated data. To fill this gap, we provide a mixed supervision perspective, in which learning novel categories (target domain) using weak annotations with the help of full annotations of existing base categories (source domain). To realize this, a mixed supervised learning framework is proposed, which contains two mutually-helping student models (\textit{f\_student} and \textit{w\_student}) that learn from fully-annotated and weakly-annotated data, respectively. The motivation is that \textit{f\_student} learned from fully-annotated data has a better ability to capture detailed information than \textit{w\_student}. Thus, we first let \textit{f\_student} guide \textit{w\_student} to learn the ability to capture details, so \textit{w\_student} can perform better in the target domain. Then we let \textit{w\_student} guide \textit{f\_student} to fine-tune on the target domain. The process can be repeated several times so that the two students perform very well in the target domain. To evaluate our method, we built three TSD datasets based on UrbanSound and Audioset. Experimental results show that our methods offer about 8\% improvement in event-based F-score as compared with a recent baseline.
abstract_zh: 目标声音检测（TSD）旨在在给定参考信息的情况下从混合音频中检测目标声音。之前的工作表明，TSD 模型可以在完全注释（帧级标签）或弱注释（剪辑级标签）数据上进行训练。然而，有一些明确的证据表明，在弱注释数据上训练的模型的性能比在完全注释数据上训练的模型要差。为了填补这一空白，我们提供了混合监督视角，其中在现有基本类别（源域）的完整注释的帮助下使用弱注释学习新类别（目标域）。为了实现这一点，提出了一种混合监督学习框架，其中包含两个互助的学生模型（\textit{f\_student} 和 \textit{w\_student}），分别从全注释和弱注释数据中学习。动机是从完全注释的数据中学习的 \textit{f\_student} 比 \textit{w\_student} 具有更好的捕获详细信息的能力。因此，我们首先让\textit{f\_student}引导\textit{w\_student}学习捕捉细节的能力，这样\textit{w\_student}可以在目标领域表现得更好。然后我们让 \t​​extit{w\_student} 引导 \textit{f\_student} 在目标域上进行微调。这个过程可以重复几次，以便两个学生在目标领域表现得很好。为了评估我们的方法，我们基于 UrbanSound 和 Audioset 构建了三个 TSD 数据集。实验结果表明，与最近的基线相比，我们的方法在基于事件的 F 分数方面提供了约 8% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合监督学习框架，用于在弱标注和全标注数据共同作用下提升目标声音检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明，基于弱标注数据训练的模型性能劣于全标注数据训练的模型，而混合利用两者标注信息可弥补这一差距。
AI.method: 设计两个互帮互助的学生模型（f_student和w_student），前者基于全标注数据学习细节捕捉能力，后者基于弱标注数据学习目标域特征，通过迭代互导优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在UrbanSound和Audioset构建的三个数据集上，事件级F-score相比最新基线提升约8%。
AI.conclusion: 混合监督框架有效融合全标注与弱标注优势，显著提升了目标声音检测的准确率。

However, there are some clear evidences show that the performance of the model trained on weakly-annotated data is worse than that trained on fully-annotated data. To fill this gap, we provide a mixed supervision perspective, in which learning novel categories (target domain) using weak annotations with the help of full annotations of existing base categories (source domain). To realize this, a mixed supervised learning framework is proposed, which contains two mutually-helping student models (\textit{f\_student} and \textit{w\_student}) that learn from fully-annotated and weakly-annotated data, respectively. The motivation is that \textit{f\_student} learned from fully-annotated data has a better ability to capture detailed information than \textit{w\_student}. Thus, we first let \textit{f\_student} guide \textit{w\_student} to learn the ability to capture details, so \textit{w\_student} can perform better in the target domain. Then we let \textit{w\_student} guide \textit{f\_student} to fine-tune on the target domain. The process can be repeated several times so that the two students perform very well in the target domain. To evaluate our method, we built three TSD datasets based on UrbanSound and Audioset. Experimental results show that our methods offer about 8\% improvement in event-based F-score as compared with a recent baseline. 目标声音检测（TSD）旨在在给定参考信息的情况下从混合音频中检测目标声音。之前的工作表明，TSD 模型可以在完全注释（帧级标签）或弱注释（剪辑级标签）数据上进行训练。然而，有一些明确的证据表明，在弱注释数据上训练的模型的性能比在完全注释数据上训练的模型要差。为了填补这一空白，我们提供了混合监督视角，其中在现有基本类别（源域）的完整注释的帮助下使用弱注释学习新类别（目标域）。为了实现这一点，提出了一种混合监督学习框架，其中包含两个互助的学生模型（\textit{f\_student} 和 \textit{w\_student}），分别从全注释和弱注释数据中学习。动机是从完全注释的数据中学习的 \textit{f\_student} 比 \textit{w\_student} 具有更好的捕获详细信息的能力。因此，我们首先让\textit{f\_student}引导\textit{w\_student}学习捕捉细节的能力，这样\textit{w\_student}可以在目标领域表现得更好。然后我们让 \t​​extit{w\_student} 引导 \textit{f\_student} 在目标域上进行微调。这个过程可以重复几次，以便两个学生在目标领域表现得很好。为了评估我们的方法，我们基于 UrbanSound 和 Audioset 构建了三个 TSD 数据集。实验结果表明，与最近的基线相比，我们的方法在基于事件的 F 分数方面提供了约 8% 的改进。 本文提出了一种混合监督学习框架，用于在弱标注和全标注数据共同作用下提升目标声音检测的性能。 Dongchao Yang,Helin Wang,Yuexian Zou,Wenwu Wang cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Maksim Makarenko,Arturo Burguete-Lopez,Qizhou Wang,Fedor Getman,Silvio Giancola,Bernard Ghanem,Andrea Fratalocchi
title: Real-time Hyperspectral Imaging in Hardware via Trained Metasurface Encoders
title_zh: 通过训练有素的超表面编码器在硬件中进行实时高光谱成像
abstract: Hyperspectral imaging has attracted significant attention to identify spectral signatures for image classification and automated pattern recognition in computer vision. State-of-the-art implementations of snapshot hyperspectral imaging rely on bulky, non-integrated, and expensive optical elements, including lenses, spectrometers, and filters. These macroscopic components do not allow fast data processing for, e.g real-time and high-resolution videos. This work introduces Hyplex, a new integrated architecture addressing the limitations discussed above. Hyplex is a CMOS-compatible, fast hyperspectral camera that replaces bulk optics with nanoscale metasurfaces inversely designed through artificial intelligence. Hyplex does not require spectrometers but makes use of conventional monochrome cameras, opening up the possibility for real-time and high-resolution hyperspectral imaging at inexpensive costs. Hyplex exploits a model-driven optimization, which connects the physical metasurfaces layer with modern visual computing approaches based on end-to-end training. We design and implement a prototype version of Hyplex and compare its performance against the state-of-the-art for typical imaging tasks such as spectral reconstruction and semantic segmentation. In all benchmarks, Hyplex reports the smallest reconstruction error. We additionally present what is, to the best of our knowledge, the largest publicly available labeled hyperspectral dataset for semantic segmentation.
summary: Hyperspectral imaging has attracted significant attention to identify spectral signatures for image classification and automated pattern recognition in computer vision. State-of-the-art implementations of snapshot hyperspectral imaging rely on bulky, non-integrated, and expensive optical elements, including lenses, spectrometers, and filters. These macroscopic components do not allow fast data processing for, e.g real-time and high-resolution videos. This work introduces Hyplex, a new integrated architecture addressing the limitations discussed above. Hyplex is a CMOS-compatible, fast hyperspectral camera that replaces bulk optics with nanoscale metasurfaces inversely designed through artificial intelligence. Hyplex does not require spectrometers but makes use of conventional monochrome cameras, opening up the possibility for real-time and high-resolution hyperspectral imaging at inexpensive costs. Hyplex exploits a model-driven optimization, which connects the physical metasurfaces layer with modern visual computing approaches based on end-to-end training. We design and implement a prototype version of Hyplex and compare its performance against the state-of-the-art for typical imaging tasks such as spectral reconstruction and semantic segmentation. In all benchmarks, Hyplex reports the smallest reconstruction error. We additionally present what is, to the best of our knowledge, the largest publicly available labeled hyperspectral dataset for semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 高光谱成像在识别计算机视觉中图像分类和自动模式识别的光谱特征方面引起了极大的关注。最先进的快照高光谱成像实现依赖于笨重、非集成且昂贵的光学元件，包括透镜、光谱仪和滤光片。这些宏观组件不允许快速数据处理，例如实时和高分辨率视频。这项工作引入了 Hyplex，这是一种解决上述限制的新集成架构。 Hyplex 是一款 CMOS 兼容的快速高光谱相机，通过人工智能逆向设计的纳米级超表面取代了体光学器件。 Hyplex 不需要光谱仪，而是使用传统的单色相机，从而以低廉的成本提供了实时和高分辨率高光谱成像的可能性。 Hyplex 利用模型驱动的优化，将物理超表面层与基于端到端训练的现代视觉计算方法连接起来。我们设计并实现了 Hyplex 的原型版本，并将其性能与光谱重建和语义分割等典型成像任务的最新技术进行比较。在所有基准测试中，Hyplex 报告的重建误差最小。据我们所知，我们还提供了最大的公开可用的用于语义分割的标记高光谱数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hyplex系统，通过训练的纳米级超表面编码器实现低成本、实时的高光谱成像硬件架构。
AI.motivation: 现有快照式高光谱成像依赖昂贵且笨重的光学元件，难以满足实时高清视频处理需求，亟需高效集成解决方案。
AI.method: 采用AI逆向设计纳米超表面替代传统光学元件，结合模型驱动优化与端到端训练，利用单色相机实现高光谱数据采集与处理。
AI.result: Hyplex在光谱重建和语义分割任务中均取得最小重建误差，并提供了目前最大的公开标注高光谱数据集。
AI.conclusion: Hyplex通过超表面与AI融合，有效解决了传统高光谱成像的硬件限制，为实时应用提供了创新技术路径。

authors_text: Qiankun Liu,Bin Liu,Yue Wu,Weihai Li,Nenghai Yu
title: Real-time Online Multi-Object Tracking in Compressed Domain
title_zh: 压缩域实时在线多目标跟踪
abstract: Recent online Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) methods have achieved desirable tracking performance. However, the tracking speed of most existing methods is rather slow. Inspired from the fact that the adjacent frames are highly relevant and redundant, we divide the frames into key and non-key frames respectively and track objects in the compressed domain. For the key frames, the RGB images are restored for detection and data association. To make data association more reliable, an appearance Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) which can be jointly trained with the detector is proposed. For the non-key frames, the objects are directly propagated by a tracking CNN based on the motion information provided in the compressed domain. Compared with the state-of-the-art online MOT methods,our tracker is about 6x faster while maintaining a comparable tracking performance.
summary: Recent online Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) methods have achieved desirable tracking performance. However, the tracking speed of most existing methods is rather slow. Inspired from the fact that the adjacent frames are highly relevant and redundant, we divide the frames into key and non-key frames respectively and track objects in the compressed domain. For the key frames, the RGB images are restored for detection and data association. To make data association more reliable, an appearance Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) which can be jointly trained with the detector is proposed. For the non-key frames, the objects are directly propagated by a tracking CNN based on the motion information provided in the compressed domain. Compared with the state-of-the-art online MOT methods,our tracker is about 6x faster while maintaining a comparable tracking performance.
abstract_zh: 最近的在线多目标跟踪（MOT）方法已经取得了理想的跟踪性能。然而，大多数现有方法的跟踪速度相当慢。受到相邻帧高度相关和冗余这一事实的启发，我们将帧分别分为关键帧和非关键帧，并在压缩域中跟踪对象。对于关键帧，恢复RGB图像以进行检测和数据关联。为了使数据关联更加可靠，提出了一种可以与检测器联合训练的外观卷积神经网络（CNN）。对于非关键帧，跟踪 CNN 根据压缩域中提供的运动信息直接传播对象。与最先进的在线 MOT 方法相比，我们的跟踪器速度提高了约 6 倍，同时保持了相当的跟踪性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在压缩域中进行实时在线多目标跟踪的方法，以提高跟踪速度。
AI.motivation: 现有在线多目标跟踪方法速度较慢，而相邻帧高度相关且冗余，因此需在压缩域中优化跟踪效率。
AI.method: 将帧分为关键帧和非关键帧：关键帧恢复RGB图像进行检测和数据关联，非关键帧通过压缩域运动信息直接传播目标。
AI.result: 相比最新在线MOT方法，跟踪器速度提升约6倍，同时保持可比的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 在压缩域中结合关键帧与非关键帧处理，有效提升了实时多目标跟踪的速度与效率。

title: Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation with Error Localization Network
title_zh: 具有错误定位网络的半监督语义分割
abstract: This paper studies semi-supervised learning of semantic segmentation, which assumes that only a small portion of training images are labeled and the others remain unlabeled. The unlabeled images are usually assigned pseudo labels to be used in training, which however often causes the risk of performance degradation due to the confirmation bias towards errors on the pseudo labels. We present a novel method that resolves this chronic issue of pseudo labeling. At the heart of our method lies error localization network (ELN), an auxiliary module that takes an image and its segmentation prediction as input and identifies pixels whose pseudo labels are likely to be wrong. ELN enables semi-supervised learning to be robust against inaccurate pseudo labels by disregarding label noises during training and can be naturally integrated with self-training and contrastive learning. Moreover, we introduce a new learning strategy for ELN that simulates plausible and diverse segmentation errors during training of ELN to enhance its generalization. Our method is evaluated on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes, where it outperforms all existing methods in every evaluation setting.
summary: This paper studies semi-supervised learning of semantic segmentation, which assumes that only a small portion of training images are labeled and the others remain unlabeled. The unlabeled images are usually assigned pseudo labels to be used in training, which however often causes the risk of performance degradation due to the confirmation bias towards errors on the pseudo labels. We present a novel method that resolves this chronic issue of pseudo labeling. At the heart of our method lies error localization network (ELN), an auxiliary module that takes an image and its segmentation prediction as input and identifies pixels whose pseudo labels are likely to be wrong. ELN enables semi-supervised learning to be robust against inaccurate pseudo labels by disregarding label noises during training and can be naturally integrated with self-training and contrastive learning. Moreover, we introduce a new learning strategy for ELN that simulates plausible and diverse segmentation errors during training of ELN to enhance its generalization. Our method is evaluated on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes, where it outperforms all existing methods in every evaluation setting.
abstract_zh: 本文研究语义分割的半监督学习，假设只有一小部分训练图像被标记，其他图像保持未标记。未标记的图像通常被分配伪标签以用于训练，然而，由于对伪标签上的错误的确认偏差，这通常会导致性能下降的风险。我们提出了一种解决伪标签这一长期问题的新方法。我们方法的核心是错误定位网络（ELN），这是一个辅助模块，它将图像及其分割预测作为输入，并识别伪标签可能错误的像素。 ELN 通过在训练期间忽略标签噪声，使半监督学习能够对不准确的伪标签具有鲁棒性，并且可以自然地与自我训练和对比学习集成。此外，我们引入了一种新的 ELN 学习策略，该策略在 ELN 训练过程中模拟合理且多样化的分割错误，以增强其泛化能力。我们的方法在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 Cityscapes 上进行了评估，在每个评估设置中它都优于所有现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督语义分割方法，通过错误定位网络解决伪标签中的错误确认偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 半监督学习中伪标签易受错误确认偏差影响，导致模型性能下降，需有效识别并抑制伪标签噪声。
AI.method: 设计错误定位网络（ELN）辅助模块，识别伪标签可能错误的像素区域，并结合自训练与对比学习策略，通过模拟多样化分割错误提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上，该方法在所有评估设置中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 错误定位网络有效增强半监督学习对伪标签噪声的鲁棒性，显著提升语义分割性能。

search_text: Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation with Error Localization Network 具有错误定位网络的半监督语义分割 This paper studies semi-supervised learning of semantic segmentation, which assumes that only a small portion of training images are labeled and the others remain unlabeled. The unlabeled images are usually assigned pseudo labels to be used in training, which however often causes the risk of performance degradation due to the confirmation bias towards errors on the pseudo labels. We present a novel method that resolves this chronic issue of pseudo labeling. At the heart of our method lies error localization network (ELN), an auxiliary module that takes an image and its segmentation prediction as input and identifies pixels whose pseudo labels are likely to be wrong. ELN enables semi-supervised learning to be robust against inaccurate pseudo labels by disregarding label noises during training and can be naturally integrated with self-training and contrastive learning. Moreover, we introduce a new learning strategy for ELN that simulates plausible and diverse segmentation errors during training of ELN to enhance its generalization. Our method is evaluated on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes, where it outperforms all existing methods in every evaluation setting. 本文研究语义分割的半监督学习，假设只有一小部分训练图像被标记，其他图像保持未标记。未标记的图像通常被分配伪标签以用于训练，然而，由于对伪标签上的错误的确认偏差，这通常会导致性能下降的风险。我们提出了一种解决伪标签这一长期问题的新方法。我们方法的核心是错误定位网络（ELN），这是一个辅助模块，它将图像及其分割预测作为输入，并识别伪标签可能错误的像素。 ELN 通过在训练期间忽略标签噪声，使半监督学习能够对不准确的伪标签具有鲁棒性，并且可以自然地与自我训练和对比学习集成。此外，我们引入了一种新的 ELN 学习策略，该策略在 ELN 训练过程中模拟合理且多样化的分割错误，以增强其泛化能力。我们的方法在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 Cityscapes 上进行了评估，在每个评估设置中它都优于所有现有方法。 本文提出一种半监督语义分割方法，通过错误定位网络解决伪标签中的错误确认偏差问题。 Donghyeon Kwon,Suha Kwak cs.CV

title: Complex-Valued Autoencoders for Object Discovery
title_zh: 用于对象发现的复值自动编码器
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
abstract: Object-centric representations form the basis of human perception, and enable us to reason about the world and to systematically generalize to new settings. Currently, most works on unsupervised object discovery focus on slot-based approaches, which explicitly separate the latent representations of individual objects. While the result is easily interpretable, it usually requires the design of involved architectures. In contrast to this, we propose a comparatively simple approach - the Complex AutoEncoder (CAE) - that creates distributed object-centric representations. Following a coding scheme theorized to underlie object representations in biological neurons, its complex-valued activations represent two messages: their magnitudes express the presence of a feature, while the relative phase differences between neurons express which features should be bound together to create joint object representations. In contrast to previous approaches using complex-valued activations for object discovery, we present a fully unsupervised approach that is trained end-to-end - resulting in significant improvements in performance and efficiency. Further, we show that the CAE achieves competitive or better unsupervised object discovery performance on simple multi-object datasets compared to a state-of-the-art slot-based approach while being up to 100 times faster to train.
summary: Object-centric representations form the basis of human perception, and enable us to reason about the world and to systematically generalize to new settings. Currently, most works on unsupervised object discovery focus on slot-based approaches, which explicitly separate the latent representations of individual objects. While the result is easily interpretable, it usually requires the design of involved architectures. In contrast to this, we propose a comparatively simple approach - the Complex AutoEncoder (CAE) - that creates distributed object-centric representations. Following a coding scheme theorized to underlie object representations in biological neurons, its complex-valued activations represent two messages: their magnitudes express the presence of a feature, while the relative phase differences between neurons express which features should be bound together to create joint object representations. In contrast to previous approaches using complex-valued activations for object discovery, we present a fully unsupervised approach that is trained end-to-end - resulting in significant improvements in performance and efficiency. Further, we show that the CAE achieves competitive or better unsupervised object discovery performance on simple multi-object datasets compared to a state-of-the-art slot-based approach while being up to 100 times faster to train.
abstract_zh: 以对象为中心的表征构成了人类感知的基础，使我们能够推理世界并系统地推广到新的环境。目前，大多数关于无监督对象发现的工作都集中在基于槽的方法，该方法显式地分离单个对象的潜在表示。虽然结果很容易解释，但通常需要设计相关架构。与此相反，我们提出了一种相对简单的方法 - 复杂自动编码器（CAE） - 创建分布式以对象为中心的表示。按照理论上构成生物神经元中对象表示的编码方案，其复值激活代表两个消息：它们的大小表示特征的存在，而神经元之间的相对相位差表示哪些特征应该绑定在一起以创建联合对象表示。与之前使用复值激活进行对象发现的方法相比，我们提出了一种完全无监督的端到端训练方法，从而显着提高了性能和效率。此外，我们还表明，与最先进的基于槽的方法相比，CAE 在简单的多对象数据集上实现了有竞争力或更好的无监督对象发现性能，同时训练速度提高了 100 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于复数自编码器（CAE）的无监督物体发现方法，通过复数激活实现分布式物体中心表示。
AI.motivation: 现有基于插槽的物体发现方法需要复杂架构设计，而生物神经元编码理论启发的复数激活机制可简化表示并提升效率。
AI.method: 设计端到端无监督复数自编码器，利用复数激活的幅度表示特征存在性，相位差表示特征绑定关系。
AI.result: 在简单多物体数据集上达到与最新插槽方法相当或更优的性能，训练速度提升达100倍。
AI.conclusion: CAE通过生物启发的复数编码机制，在保持性能的同时显著提升无监督物体发现的效率。

title: Split Hierarchical Variational Compression
title_zh: 分裂分层变分压缩
abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) have witnessed great success in performing the compression of image datasets. This success, made possible by the bits-back coding framework, has produced competitive compression performance across many benchmarks. However, despite this, VAE architectures are currently limited by a combination of coding practicalities and compression ratios. That is, not only do state-of-the-art methods, such as normalizing flows, often demonstrate out-performance, but the initial bits required in coding makes single and parallel image compression challenging. To remedy this, we introduce Split Hierarchical Variational Compression (SHVC). SHVC introduces two novelties. Firstly, we propose an efficient autoregressive prior, the autoregressive sub-pixel convolution, that allows a generalisation between per-pixel autoregressions and fully factorised probability models. Secondly, we define our coding framework, the autoregressive initial bits, that flexibly supports parallel coding and avoids -- for the first time -- many of the practicalities commonly associated with bits-back coding. In our experiments, we demonstrate SHVC is able to achieve state-of-the-art compression performance across full-resolution lossless image compression tasks, with up to 100x fewer model parameters than competing VAE approaches.
summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) have witnessed great success in performing the compression of image datasets. This success, made possible by the bits-back coding framework, has produced competitive compression performance across many benchmarks. However, despite this, VAE architectures are currently limited by a combination of coding practicalities and compression ratios. That is, not only do state-of-the-art methods, such as normalizing flows, often demonstrate out-performance, but the initial bits required in coding makes single and parallel image compression challenging. To remedy this, we introduce Split Hierarchical Variational Compression (SHVC). SHVC introduces two novelties. Firstly, we propose an efficient autoregressive prior, the autoregressive sub-pixel convolution, that allows a generalisation between per-pixel autoregressions and fully factorised probability models. Secondly, we define our coding framework, the autoregressive initial bits, that flexibly supports parallel coding and avoids -- for the first time -- many of the practicalities commonly associated with bits-back coding. In our experiments, we demonstrate SHVC is able to achieve state-of-the-art compression performance across full-resolution lossless image compression tasks, with up to 100x fewer model parameters than competing VAE approaches.
abstract_zh: 变分自动编码器（VAE）在执行图像数据集压缩方面取得了巨大成功。这一成功得益于位回编码框架，在许多基准测试中产生了具有竞争力的压缩性能。然而，尽管如此，VAE 架构目前仍受到编码实用性和压缩比的限制。也就是说，不仅最先进的方法（例如标准化流）经常表现出优异的性能，而且编码所需的初始位使得单个和并行图像压缩具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了分割分层变分压缩（SHVC）。 SHVC 推出了两项新产品。首先，我们提出了一种高效的自回归先验，即自回归子像素卷积，它允许在每像素自回归和完全分解的概率模型之间进行泛化。其次，我们定义了我们的编码框架，即自回归初始位，它灵活地支持并行编码，并首次避免了通常与位回编码相关的许多实用性。在我们的实验中，我们证明 SHVC 能够在全分辨率无损图像压缩任务中实现最先进的压缩性能，并且模型参数比竞争 VAE 方法少 100 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Split Hierarchical Variational Compression (SHVC)的新型变分压缩方法，旨在解决现有变分自编码器（VAE）在图像压缩中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管VAE在图像压缩中表现出色，但其受限于编码实用性与压缩率的平衡问题，且现有方法如归一化流在参数效率和并行编码支持上存在不足。
AI.method: SHVC引入两种创新：1）自回归子像素卷积，实现像素级自回归与全因子概率模型的泛化；2）自回归初始位框架，支持并行编码并减少bits-back编码的复杂性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SHVC在全分辨率无损图像压缩任务中达到最先进水平，模型参数量仅为竞品方法的1/100。
AI.conclusion: SHVC通过结构创新有效解决了VAE压缩的瓶颈问题，为高效图像压缩提供了新的技术路径。

method: SHVC引入两种创新：1）自回归子像素卷积，实现像素级自回归与全因子概率模型的泛化；2）自回归初始位框架，支持并行编码并减少bits-back编码的复杂性。
result: 实验表明，SHVC在全分辨率无损图像压缩任务中达到最先进水平，模型参数量仅为竞品方法的1/100。
conclusion: SHVC通过结构创新有效解决了VAE压缩的瓶颈问题，为高效图像压缩提供了新的技术路径。
search_text: Split Hierarchical Variational Compression 分裂分层变分压缩 Variational autoencoders (VAEs) have witnessed great success in performing the compression of image datasets. This success, made possible by the bits-back coding framework, has produced competitive compression performance across many benchmarks. However, despite this, VAE architectures are currently limited by a combination of coding practicalities and compression ratios. That is, not only do state-of-the-art methods, such as normalizing flows, often demonstrate out-performance, but the initial bits required in coding makes single and parallel image compression challenging. To remedy this, we introduce Split Hierarchical Variational Compression (SHVC). SHVC introduces two novelties. Firstly, we propose an efficient autoregressive prior, the autoregressive sub-pixel convolution, that allows a generalisation between per-pixel autoregressions and fully factorised probability models. Secondly, we define our coding framework, the autoregressive initial bits, that flexibly supports parallel coding and avoids -- for the first time -- many of the practicalities commonly associated with bits-back coding. In our experiments, we demonstrate SHVC is able to achieve state-of-the-art compression performance across full-resolution lossless image compression tasks, with up to 100x fewer model parameters than competing VAE approaches. 变分自动编码器（VAE）在执行图像数据集压缩方面取得了巨大成功。这一成功得益于位回编码框架，在许多基准测试中产生了具有竞争力的压缩性能。然而，尽管如此，VAE 架构目前仍受到编码实用性和压缩比的限制。也就是说，不仅最先进的方法（例如标准化流）经常表现出优异的性能，而且编码所需的初始位使得单个和并行图像压缩具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了分割分层变分压缩（SHVC）。 SHVC 推出了两项新产品。首先，我们提出了一种高效的自回归先验，即自回归子像素卷积，它允许在每像素自回归和完全分解的概率模型之间进行泛化。其次，我们定义了我们的编码框架，即自回归初始位，它灵活地支持并行编码，并首次避免了通常与位回编码相关的许多实用性。在我们的实验中，我们证明 SHVC 能够在全分辨率无损图像压缩任务中实现最先进的压缩性能，并且模型参数比竞争 VAE 方法少 100 倍。 本文提出了一种名为Split Hierarchical Variational Compression (SHVC)的新型变分压缩方法，旨在解决现有变分自编码器（VAE）在图像压缩中的局限性。 Tom Ryder,Chen Zhang,Ning Kang,Shifeng Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: Spread Spurious Attribute: Improving Worst-group Accuracy with Spurious Attribute Estimation
title_zh: 传播杂散属性：通过杂散属性估计提高最差组精度
abstract: The paradigm of worst-group loss minimization has shown its promise in avoiding to learn spurious correlations, but requires costly additional supervision on spurious attributes. To resolve this, recent works focus on developing weaker forms of supervision -- e.g., hyperparameters discovered with a small number of validation samples with spurious attribute annotation -- but none of the methods retain comparable performance to methods using full supervision on the spurious attribute. In this paper, instead of searching for weaker supervisions, we ask: Given access to a fixed number of samples with spurious attribute annotations, what is the best achievable worst-group loss if we "fully exploit" them? To this end, we propose a pseudo-attribute-based algorithm, coined Spread Spurious Attribute (SSA), for improving the worst-group accuracy. In particular, we leverage samples both with and without spurious attribute annotations to train a model to predict the spurious attribute, then use the pseudo-attribute predicted by the trained model as supervision on the spurious attribute to train a new robust model having minimal worst-group loss. Our experiments on various benchmark datasets show that our algorithm consistently outperforms the baseline methods using the same number of validation samples with spurious attribute annotations. We also demonstrate that the proposed SSA can achieve comparable performances to methods using full (100%) spurious attribute supervision, by using a much smaller number of annotated samples -- from 0.6% and up to 1.5%, depending on the dataset.
summary: The paradigm of worst-group loss minimization has shown its promise in avoiding to learn spurious correlations, but requires costly additional supervision on spurious attributes. To resolve this, recent works focus on developing weaker forms of supervision -- e.g., hyperparameters discovered with a small number of validation samples with spurious attribute annotation -- but none of the methods retain comparable performance to methods using full supervision on the spurious attribute. In this paper, instead of searching for weaker supervisions, we ask: Given access to a fixed number of samples with spurious attribute annotations, what is the best achievable worst-group loss if we "fully exploit" them? To this end, we propose a pseudo-attribute-based algorithm, coined Spread Spurious Attribute (SSA), for improving the worst-group accuracy. In particular, we leverage samples both with and without spurious attribute annotations to train a model to predict the spurious attribute, then use the pseudo-attribute predicted by the trained model as supervision on the spurious attribute to train a new robust model having minimal worst-group loss. Our experiments on various benchmark datasets show that our algorithm consistently outperforms the baseline methods using the same number of validation samples with spurious attribute annotations. We also demonstrate that the proposed SSA can achieve comparable performances to methods using full (100%) spurious attribute supervision, by using a much smaller number of annotated samples -- from 0.6% and up to 1.5%, depending on the dataset.
abstract_zh: 最坏组损失最小化的范式已经显示出其在避免学习虚假相关性方面的前景，但需要对虚假属性进行昂贵的额外监督。为了解决这个问题，最近的工作重点是开发较弱的监督形式——例如，通过少量具有虚假属性注释的验证样本发现超参数——但没有一种方法能够保持与对虚假属性使用完全监督的方法相当的性能。在本文中，我们不是寻找较弱的监督，而是问：如果可以访问固定数量的带有虚假属性注释的样本，如果我们“充分利用”它们，可实现的最佳最坏组损失是多少？为此，我们提出了一种基于伪属性的算法，称为传播虚假属性（SSA），用于提高最差组的准确性。特别是，我们利用带有和不带有虚假属性注释的样本来训练模型来预测虚假属性，然后使用训练模型预测的伪属性作为虚假属性的监督来训练具有最小最差组损失的新鲁棒模型。我们对各种基准数据集的实验表明，我们的算法始终优于使用相同数量的带有虚假属性注释的验证样本的基线方法。我们还证明，通过使用更少数量的注释样本（从 0.6% 到 1.5%，具体取决于数据集），所提出的 SSA 可以实现与使用完全（100%）虚假属性监督的方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spread Spurious Attribute (SSA)的算法，旨在通过有限的虚假属性标注样本提高最差群体的准确率。
AI.motivation: 最差群体损失最小化方法在避免学习虚假相关性方面表现出潜力，但需要昂贵的额外监督来标注虚假属性。现有的方法虽然尝试使用更弱的监督形式，但效果不如完全监督的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于伪属性的算法SSA，利用有和没有虚假属性标注的样本训练模型预测虚假属性，并使用预测的伪属性作为监督来训练具有最小最差群体损失的鲁棒模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，SSA在使用相同数量的验证样本时，性能优于基线方法，并且在使用更少的标注样本（0.6%到1.5%）时，性能可与使用100%标注样本的方法相媲美。
AI.conclusion: SSA算法能够有效利用有限的虚假属性标注样本，显著提升最差群体的准确率，减少对完全监督的依赖。

authors_text: Ricky K. Taira,Anders O. Garlid,William Speier
title: Design considerations for a hierarchical semantic compositional framework for medical natural language understanding
title_zh: 医学自然语言理解的分层语义组合框架的设计考虑
abstract: Medical natural language processing (NLP) systems are a key enabling technology for transforming Big Data from clinical report repositories to information used to support disease models and validate intervention methods. However, current medical NLP systems fall considerably short when faced with the task of logically interpreting clinical text. In this paper, we describe a framework inspired by mechanisms of human cognition in an attempt to jump the NLP performance curve. The design centers about a hierarchical semantic compositional model (HSCM) which provides an internal substrate for guiding the interpretation process. The paper describes insights from four key cognitive aspects including semantic memory, semantic composition, semantic activation, and hierarchical predictive coding. We discuss the design of a generative semantic model and an associated semantic parser used to transform a free-text sentence into a logical representation of its meaning. The paper discusses supportive and antagonistic arguments for the key features of the architecture as a long-term foundational framework.
summary: Medical natural language processing (NLP) systems are a key enabling technology for transforming Big Data from clinical report repositories to information used to support disease models and validate intervention methods. However, current medical NLP systems fall considerably short when faced with the task of logically interpreting clinical text. In this paper, we describe a framework inspired by mechanisms of human cognition in an attempt to jump the NLP performance curve. The design centers about a hierarchical semantic compositional model (HSCM) which provides an internal substrate for guiding the interpretation process. The paper describes insights from four key cognitive aspects including semantic memory, semantic composition, semantic activation, and hierarchical predictive coding. We discuss the design of a generative semantic model and an associated semantic parser used to transform a free-text sentence into a logical representation of its meaning. The paper discusses supportive and antagonistic arguments for the key features of the architecture as a long-term foundational framework.
abstract_zh: 医学自然语言处理 (NLP) 系统是将大数据从临床报告存储库转换为用于支持疾病模型和验证干预方法的信息的关键支持技术。然而，当前的医学 NLP 系统在面临逻辑解释临床文本的任务时还远远不够。在本文中，我们描述了一个受人类认知机制启发的框架，试图跨越 NLP 的性能曲线。该设计以分层语义组合模型（HSCM）为中心，该模型为指导解释过程提供了内部基础。该论文描述了四个关键认知方面的见解，包括语义记忆、语义构成、语义激活和分层预测编码。我们讨论了生成语义模型和相关语义解析器的设计，用于将自由文本句子转换为其含义的逻辑表示。本文讨论了对该架构作为长期基础框架的关键特征的支持和反对意见。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人类认知机制的分层语义组合框架（HSCM），旨在提升医疗自然语言处理系统对临床文本的逻辑解释能力。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗NLP系统在处理临床文本的逻辑解释任务时表现不足，需借鉴人类认知机制以突破性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计分层语义组合模型（HSCM），结合语义记忆、语义组合、语义激活和分层预测编码四个认知维度，构建生成式语义模型与语义解析器。
AI.result: 提出了框架的核心设计与实现方案，并探讨了其关键特征的支持性与争议性论点。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为医疗NLP领域提供了长期基础性解决方案，但需进一步验证其实际效果与可行性。
